     1→'use strict';
     2→
     3→/* ===== QUICK MODE STATE (Web Speech API) ===== */
     4→let recognition       = null;
     5→let isListening       = false;
     6→let quickFinalTranscript = '';
     7→let silenceTimer      = null;
     8→const SILENCE_DELAY   = 3500; // ms — auto-stop after this much silence
     9→
    10→/* ===== BRAINSTORM MODE STATE (WebSocket + PCM audio) ===== */
    11→let ws, audioContext, processor, source, stream;
    12→let isBrainstormRecording  = false;
    13→let isBrainstormProcessing = false; // after stop_recording, waiting for WS idle
    14→let isStopping             = false; // allow final audio flush during stop
    15→let isReplaying            = false;
    16→let timerInterval, startTime;
    17→let audioBuffer            = new Int16Array(0);
    18→let wsConnected            = false;
    19→let streamInitialized      = false;
    20→let brainstormTranscript   = '';
    21→let _awaitingBrainstormResult = false;
    22→
    23→/* ===== URL PARAMS ===== */
    24→const urlParams   = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    25→const autoStart   = urlParams.get('start') === '1';
    26→let   isAutoStarted = false;
    27→
    28→/* ===== INDEXEDDB STATE ===== */
    29→let db              = null;
    30→let currentSessionId = null;
    31→let sessionStartTime = null;
    32→let chunkSeq        = 0;
    33→let storageAvailable = false;
    34→
    35→/* ===== DOM REFS ===== */
    36→const quickBtn         = document.getElementById('quick-btn');
    37→const quickRing        = document.getElementById('quick-ring');
    38→const brainstormBtn    = document.getElementById('brainstorm-btn');
    39→const brainstormRing   = document.getElementById('brainstorm-ring');
    40→const micHint          = document.getElementById('mic-hint');
    41→const liveTranscript   = document.getElementById('live-transcript');
    42→const liveText         = document.getElementById('live-text');
    43→const transcriptBar    = document.getElementById('transcript-bar');
    44→const transcriptText   = document.getElementById('transcript-text');
    45→const sendBtn          = document.getElementById('send-btn');
    46→const discardBtn       = document.getElementById('discard-btn');
    47→const messagesEl       = document.getElementById('messages');
    48→const messagesEmpty    = document.getElementById('messages-empty');
    49→const timerEl          = document.getElementById('timer');
    50→const replayButton     = document.getElementById('replayButton');
    51→const connectionStatus = document.getElementById('connectionStatus');
    52→const notSupported     = document.getElementById('not-supported');
    53→const settingsBtn      = document.getElementById('settings-btn');
    54→const modalOverlay     = document.getElementById('modal-overlay');
    55→const modalClose       = document.getElementById('modal-close');
    56→const webhookInput     = document.getElementById('webhook-url');
    57→const backendUrlInput  = document.getElementById('backend-url');
    58→const langSelect       = document.getElementById('lang-select');
    59→const saveSettings     = document.getElementById('save-settings');
    60→const modelSelect      = document.getElementById('modelSelect');
    61→
    62→/* ===== POST-PROCESSING DOM REFS ===== */
    63→const postprocessBar           = document.getElementById('postprocess-bar');
    64→const readabilityBtn           = document.getElementById('readability-btn');
    65→const inspireBtn               = document.getElementById('inspire-btn');
    66→const postprocessResult        = document.getElementById('postprocess-result');
    67→const postprocessLabel         = document.getElementById('postprocess-label');
    68→const postprocessText          = document.getElementById('postprocess-text');
    69→const postprocessResultActions = document.getElementById('postprocess-result-actions');
    70→const postprocessSendBtn       = document.getElementById('postprocess-send-btn');
    71→
    72→/* ===== UTILITY ===== */
    73→function escapeHtml(str) {
    74→    return str
    75→        .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
    76→        .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
    77→        .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
    78→        .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
    79→        .replace(/'/g, '&#39;');
    80→}
    81→
    82→/* ===== TIMER ===== */
    83→function startTimer() {
    84→    clearInterval(timerInterval);
    85→    startTime = Date.now();
    86→    timerEl.hidden = false;
    87→    timerEl.textContent = '00:00';
    88→    timerInterval = setInterval(() => {
    89→        const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
    90→        const mins = Math.floor(elapsed / 60000);
    91→        const secs = Math.floor((elapsed % 60000) / 1000);
    92→        timerEl.textContent = `${String(mins).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(secs).padStart(2, '0')}`;
    93→    }, 1000);
    94→}
    95→
    96→function stopTimer() {
    97→    clearInterval(timerInterval);
    98→    timerEl.hidden = true;
    99→}
   100→
   101→/* ===== LIVE TRANSCRIPT AREA ===== */
   102→function showLiveTranscript(text, mode) {
   103→    liveTranscript.hidden = false;
   104→    liveTranscript.classList.toggle('brainstorm-mode', mode === 'brainstorm');
   105→    if (text) {
   106→        liveText.textContent = text;
   107→        liveText.classList.add('has-text');
   108→    } else {
   109→        liveText.textContent = mode === 'quick' ? 'Listening…' : 'Recording…';
   110→        liveText.classList.remove('has-text');
   111→    }
   112→}
   113→
   114→function updateLiveText(text) {
   115→    if (text) {
   116→        liveText.textContent = text;
   117→        liveText.classList.add('has-text');
   118→        if (isBrainstormProcessing) {
   119→            liveTranscript.scrollTop = liveTranscript.scrollHeight;
   120→        }
   121→    } else {
   122→        liveText.textContent = isListening ? 'Listening…' : 'Recording…';
   123→        liveText.classList.remove('has-text');
   124→    }
   125→}
   126→
   127→function hideLiveTranscript() {
   128→    liveTranscript.hidden = true;
   129→    liveText.textContent = 'Listening…';
   130→    liveText.classList.remove('has-text');
   131→}
   132→
   133→/* ===== TRANSCRIPT BAR ===== */
   134→function showTranscriptBar(text, source) {
   135→    transcriptText.textContent = text;
   136→    transcriptBar.dataset.source = source || 'quick';
   137→    transcriptBar.hidden = false;
   138→
   139→    // Show / reset post-processing for Brainstorm mode
   140→    const isBrainstorm = source === 'brainstorm';
   141→    postprocessBar.hidden = !isBrainstorm;
   142→    postprocessResult.hidden = true;
   143→    postprocessResultActions.hidden = true;
   144→    postprocessText.textContent = '';
   145→    readabilityBtn.textContent = 'Readability';
   146→    inspireBtn.textContent = 'Inspire';
   147→    readabilityBtn.disabled = false;
   148→    inspireBtn.disabled = false;
   149→}
   150→
   151→function hideTranscriptBar() {
   152→    transcriptBar.hidden = true;
   153→    transcriptText.textContent = '';
   154→    // Reset post-processing state
   155→    postprocessBar.hidden = true;
   156→    postprocessResult.hidden = true;
   157→    postprocessResultActions.hidden = true;
   158→    postprocessText.textContent = '';
   159→}
   160→
   161→/* ===== MESSAGE HISTORY ===== */
   162→function addMessage(text, timestamp, status) {
   163→    messagesEmpty.style.display = 'none';
   164→    const el = document.createElement('div');
   165→    el.className = `message ${status}`;
   166→    const timeStr = new Date(timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
   167→    const statusLabel = { sending: 'Sending…', sent: 'Sent', error: 'Failed', 'no-webhook': 'No webhook' };
   168→    el.innerHTML = `
   169→        <p class="message-text">${escapeHtml(text)}</p>
   170→        <div class="message-meta">
   171→            <span class="message-time">${timeStr}</span>
   172→            <span class="message-status">${statusLabel[status] || status}</span>
   173→        </div>
   174→    `;
   175→    messagesEl.appendChild(el);
   176→    el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'end' });
   177→    return el;
   178→}
   179→
   180→function updateMessageStatus(el, status) {
   181→    el.className = `message ${status}`;
   182→    const statusEl = el.querySelector('.message-status');
   183→    const labels = { sent: 'Sent', error: 'Failed', 'no-webhook': 'No webhook set' };
   184→    if (statusEl) statusEl.textContent = labels[status] || status;
   185→}
   186→
   187→/* ===== WEBHOOK SEND ===== */
   188→async function sendMessage(text, source) {
   189→    const webhookUrl = localStorage.getItem('webhookUrl') || '';
   190→    const timestamp  = new Date().toISOString();
   191→    const payload    = { text, source, timestamp };
   192→    const msgEl      = addMessage(text, timestamp, 'sending');
   193→
   194→    if (!webhookUrl) {
   195→        updateMessageStatus(msgEl, 'no-webhook');
   196→        return;
   197→    }
   198→
   199→    try {
   200→        const res = await fetch(webhookUrl, {
   201→            method:  'POST',
   202→            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   203→            body:    JSON.stringify(payload),
   204→        });
   205→        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);
   206→        updateMessageStatus(msgEl, 'sent');
   207→    } catch (err) {
   208→        console.warn('Webhook error:', err);
   209→        updateMessageStatus(msgEl, 'error');
   210→    }
   211→}
   212→
   213→/* ===== TRANSCRIPT BAR ACTIONS ===== */
   214→sendBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
   215→    const text   = transcriptText.textContent.trim();
   216→    const source = transcriptBar.dataset.source || 'quick';
   217→    if (!text) return;
   218→    hideTranscriptBar();
   219→    await sendMessage(text, source);
   220→});
   221→
   222→discardBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
   223→    hideTranscriptBar();
   224→});
   225→
   226→/* ===== BRAINSTORM POST-PROCESSING ===== */
   227→
   228→function getBackendBaseUrl() {
   229→    const backendUrl = localStorage.getItem('brainwaveBackendUrl') || '';
   230→    if (backendUrl) {
   231→        try {
   232→            const url = new URL(backendUrl);
   233→            return `${url.protocol}//${url.host}`;
   234→        } catch (_) { /* fall through to default */ }
   235→    }
   236→    return `${window.location.protocol}//${window.location.host}`;
   237→}
   238→
   239→let _postprocessedContent = '';
   240→
   241→async function runPostProcess(endpoint, label, activeBtn) {
   242→    const text = transcriptText.textContent.trim();
   243→    if (!text) return;
   244→
   245→    // Reset result area
   246→    _postprocessedContent = '';
   247→    postprocessText.textContent = '';
   248→    postprocessLabel.textContent = label;
   249→    postprocessResultActions.hidden = true;
   250→
   251→    // Disable both buttons; show loading on the active one
   252→    readabilityBtn.disabled = true;
   253→    inspireBtn.disabled = true;
   254→    const origLabel = activeBtn.textContent;
   255→    activeBtn.textContent = 'Processing…';
   256→
   257→    // Show the result area (empty initially so user sees it appeared)
   258→    postprocessResult.hidden = false;
   259→
   260→    try {
   261→        const response = await fetch(`${getBackendBaseUrl()}${endpoint}`, {
   262→            method:  'POST',
   263→            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   264→            body:    JSON.stringify({ text }),
   265→        });
   266→
   267→        if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);
   268→
   269→        const reader  = response.body.getReader();
   270→        const decoder = new TextDecoder();
   271→
   272→        while (true) {
   273→            const { done, value } = await reader.read();
   274→            if (done) break;
   275→            _postprocessedContent += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
   276→            postprocessText.textContent = _postprocessedContent;
   277→        }
   278→
   279→        // Streaming complete — show Send button
   280→        postprocessResultActions.hidden = false;
   281→
   282→    } catch (err) {
   283→        console.error('Post-processing error:', err);
   284→        postprocessText.textContent = 'Error: could not process. Check connection and try again.';
   285→    } finally {
   286→        activeBtn.textContent = origLabel;
   287→        readabilityBtn.disabled = false;
   288→        inspireBtn.disabled = false;
   289→    }
   290→}
   291→
   292→readabilityBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
   293→    runPostProcess('/api/v1/readability', 'Readability', readabilityBtn);
   294→});
   295→
   296→inspireBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
   297→    runPostProcess('/api/v1/correctness', 'Inspire', inspireBtn);
   298→});
   299→
   300→postprocessSendBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
   301→    const text = _postprocessedContent.trim();
   302→    if (!text) return;
   303→    hideTranscriptBar();
   304→    await sendMessage(text, 'brainstorm');
   305→});
   306→
   307→/* ===== SETTINGS MODAL ===== */
   308→settingsBtn.addEventListener('click', openSettings);
   309→modalClose.addEventListener('click', closeSettings);
   310→modalOverlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === modalOverlay) closeSettings(); });
   311→document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { if (e.key === 'Escape') closeSettings(); });
   312→
   313→saveSettings.addEventListener('click', () => {
   314→    const url = webhookInput.value.trim();
   315→    localStorage.setItem('webhookUrl', url);
   316→
   317→    const backendUrl = backendUrlInput.value.trim();
   318→    if (backendUrl) {
   319→        localStorage.setItem('brainwaveBackendUrl', backendUrl);
   320→    } else {
   321→        localStorage.removeItem('brainwaveBackendUrl');
   322→    }
   323→
   324→    const lang     = langSelect.value;
   325→    const prevLang = localStorage.getItem('recognitionLang') || '';
   326→    if (lang !== prevLang) {
   327→        if (lang) {
   328→            localStorage.setItem('recognitionLang', lang);
   329→        } else {
   330→            localStorage.removeItem('recognitionLang');
   331→        }
   332→        // Re-init recognition so new language takes effect immediately
   333→        if (!isListening) initRecognition();
   334→    }
   335→
   336→    closeSettings();
   337→});
   338→
   339→function openSettings() {
   340→    webhookInput.value    = localStorage.getItem('webhookUrl') || '';
   341→    backendUrlInput.value = localStorage.getItem('brainwaveBackendUrl') || '';
   342→    langSelect.value      = localStorage.getItem('recognitionLang') || '';
   343→    modalOverlay.hidden   = false;
   344→    webhookInput.focus();
   345→}
   346→
   347→function closeSettings() {
   348→    modalOverlay.hidden = true;
   349→}
   350→
   351→/* ===================================================
   352→   QUICK MODE — Web Speech API
   353→   No WebSocket. No backend. Browser-only.
   354→   =================================================== */
   355→
   356→const SpeechRecognition = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;
   357→
   358→function getRecognitionLang() {
   359→    return localStorage.getItem('recognitionLang') || navigator.language || 'en-US';
   360→}
   361→
   362→function initRecognition() {
   363→    if (!SpeechRecognition) return;
   364→
   365→    recognition = new SpeechRecognition();
   366→    recognition.continuous      = true;
   367→    recognition.interimResults  = true;
   368→    recognition.lang            = getRecognitionLang();
   369→    recognition.maxAlternatives = 1;
   370→
   371→    recognition.onstart = () => {
   372→        isListening      = true;
   373→        quickFinalTranscript = '';
   374→        showLiveTranscript('', 'quick');
   375→        quickBtn.classList.add('recording');
   376→        quickRing.classList.add('recording');
   377→        quickBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', 'true');
   378→        brainstormBtn.disabled = true;
   379→        replayButton.disabled  = true;
   380→        micHint.textContent = 'Listening… tap Quick to stop';
   381→        micHint.classList.add('active');
   382→        micHint.classList.remove('brainstorm-active', 'processing');
   383→    };
   384→
   385→    recognition.onresult = (event) => {
   386→        let interim = '';
   387→        for (let i = event.resultIndex; i < event.results.length; i++) {
   388→            const result = event.results[i];
   389→            if (result.isFinal) {
   390→                quickFinalTranscript += result[0].transcript + ' ';
   391→            } else {
   392→                interim += result[0].transcript;
   393→            }
   394→        }
   395→        const displayText = (quickFinalTranscript + interim).trim();
   396→        updateLiveText(displayText);
   397→        resetSilenceTimer();
   398→    };
   399→
   400→    recognition.onerror = (event) => {
   401→        if (event.error !== 'no-speech') {
   402→            console.warn('Speech recognition error:', event.error);
   403→        }
   404→        stopQuickMode();
   405→    };
   406→
   407→    recognition.onend = () => {
   408→        // If we didn't stop manually, recognition auto-stopped
   409→        if (isListening) {
   410→            finishQuickRecording();
   411→        }
   412→    };
   413→}
   414→
   415→function resetSilenceTimer() {
   416→    clearTimeout(silenceTimer);
   417→    silenceTimer = setTimeout(() => {
   418→        if (isListening) stopQuickMode();
   419→    }, SILENCE_DELAY);
   420→}
   421→
   422→function startQuickMode() {
   423→    if (isListening || isBrainstormRecording || isBrainstormProcessing || isReplaying) return;
   424→    if (!recognition) {
   425→        alert('Speech recognition is not available in this browser.');
   426→        return;
   427→    }
   428→    hideTranscriptBar();
   429→    try {
   430→        recognition.start();
   431→    } catch (e) {
   432→        console.warn('Could not start recognition:', e);
   433→        initRecognition();
   434→        try { recognition.start(); } catch (_) {}
   435→    }
   436→    resetSilenceTimer();
   437→}
   438→
   439→function stopQuickMode() {
   440→    clearTimeout(silenceTimer);
   441→    // Mark as not listening BEFORE calling recognition.stop() so that
   442→    // recognition.onend doesn't also call finishQuickRecording()
   443→    isListening = false;
   444→    if (recognition) {
   445→        try { recognition.stop(); } catch (_) {}
   446→    }
   447→    finishQuickRecording();
   448→}
   449→
   450→function finishQuickRecording() {
   451→    isListening = false;
   452→    clearTimeout(silenceTimer);
   453→    quickBtn.classList.remove('recording');
   454→    quickRing.classList.remove('recording');
   455→    quickBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', 'false');
   456→    brainstormBtn.disabled = false;
   457→    micHint.textContent    = '';
   458→    micHint.classList.remove('active');
   459→    hideLiveTranscript();
   460→    updateReplayButtonState();
   461→
   462→    const text = quickFinalTranscript.trim();
   463→    quickFinalTranscript = '';
   464→    if (text) {
   465→        showTranscriptBar(text, 'quick');
   466→    }
   467→}
   468→
   469→quickBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
   470→    if (isListening) {
   471→        stopQuickMode();
   472→    } else if (!isBrainstormRecording && !isBrainstormProcessing && !isReplaying) {
   473→        startQuickMode();
   474→    }
   475→});
   476→
   477→/* ===================================================
   478→   BRAINSTORM MODE — WebSocket + PCM16 audio streaming
   479→   =================================================== */
   480→
   481→function getWebSocketUrl() {
   482→    const backendUrl = localStorage.getItem('brainwaveBackendUrl') || '';
   483→    if (backendUrl) {
   484→        try {
   485→            const url    = new URL(backendUrl);
   486→            const wsProto = url.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss:' : 'ws:';
   487→            return `${wsProto}//${url.host}/api/v1/ws`;
   488→        } catch (_) { /* fall through to default */ }
   489→    }
   490→    const proto = window.location.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss' : 'ws';
   491→    return `${proto}://${window.location.host}/api/v1/ws`;
   492→}
   493→
   494→function updateConnectionStatus(status) {
   495→    connectionStatus.className = 'ws-dot';
   496→    switch (status) {
   497→        case 'connected':
   498→            connectionStatus.classList.add('connected');
   499→            connectionStatus.title = 'Connected';
   500→            break;
   501→        case 'connecting':
   502→            connectionStatus.classList.add('connecting');
   503→            connectionStatus.title = 'Connecting…';
   504→            break;
   505→        case 'idle':
   506→            connectionStatus.classList.add('idle');
   507→            connectionStatus.title = 'Ready';
   508→            break;
   509→        default:
   510→            connectionStatus.title = 'Disconnected';
   511→    }
   512→}
   513→
   514→function initializeWebSocket() {
   515→    ws = new WebSocket(getWebSocketUrl());
   516→
   517→    ws.onopen = () => {
   518→        wsConnected = true;
   519→        updateConnectionStatus('idle');
   520→        if (autoStart && !isBrainstormRecording && !isAutoStarted) {
   521→            isAutoStarted = true;
   522→            startBrainstormRecording();
   523→        }
   524→    };
   525→
   526→    ws.onerror = (error) => {
   527→        console.error('WebSocket error:', error);
   528→        updateConnectionStatus('disconnected');
   529→    };
   530→
   531→    ws.onmessage = (event) => {
   532→        const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
   533→        switch (data.type) {
   534→            case 'status':
   535→                updateConnectionStatus(data.status);
   536→                if (data.status === 'idle') {
   537→                    stopTimer();
   538→                    if (_awaitingBrainstormResult) {
   539→                        _awaitingBrainstormResult = false;
   540→                        isBrainstormProcessing    = false;
   541→                        quickBtn.disabled         = false;
   542→                        brainstormBtn.disabled    = false;
   543→                        micHint.textContent       = '';
   544→                        micHint.classList.remove('active', 'brainstorm-active', 'processing');
   545→                        hideLiveTranscript();
   546→                        updateReplayButtonState();
   547→                        const finalText = brainstormTranscript.trim();
   548→                        brainstormTranscript = '';
   549→                        if (finalText) {
   550→                            showTranscriptBar(finalText, 'brainstorm');
   551→                        }
   552→                    }
   553→                }
   554→                break;
   555→
   556→            case 'text':
   557→                if (data.isNewResponse) {
   558→                    brainstormTranscript = data.content;
   559→                } else {
   560→                    brainstormTranscript += data.content;
   561→                }
   562→                if (isBrainstormProcessing) {
   563→                    updateLiveText(brainstormTranscript);
   564→                }
   565→                break;
   566→
   567→            case 'error':
   568→                alert(data.content);
   569→                updateConnectionStatus('idle');
   570→                _awaitingBrainstormResult = false;
   571→                isBrainstormProcessing    = false;
   572→                quickBtn.disabled         = false;
   573→                brainstormBtn.disabled    = false;
   574→                micHint.textContent       = '';
   575→                micHint.classList.remove('active', 'brainstorm-active', 'processing');
   576→                hideLiveTranscript();
   577→                brainstormTranscript = '';
   578→                updateReplayButtonState();
   579→                break;
   580→        }
   581→    };
   582→
   583→    ws.onclose = () => {
   584→        wsConnected            = false;
   585→        isBrainstormRecording  = false;
   586→        isStopping             = false;
   587→        updateConnectionStatus('disconnected');
   588→        brainstormBtn.classList.remove('recording');
   589→        brainstormRing.classList.remove('recording');
   590→        brainstormBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', 'false');
   591→        // Reconnect automatically
   592→        setTimeout(initializeWebSocket, 1000);
   593→    };
   594→}
   595→
   596→/* ===== Audio processing ===== */
   597→function createAudioProcessor() {
   598→    processor = audioContext.createScriptProcessor(4096, 1, 1);
   599→    processor.onaudioprocess = async (e) => {
   600→        if (!isBrainstormRecording && !isStopping) return;
   601→
   602→        const inputData = e.inputBuffer.getChannelData(0);
   603→        const pcmData   = new Int16Array(inputData.length);
   604→        for (let i = 0; i < inputData.length; i++) {
   605→            pcmData[i] = Math.max(-32768, Math.min(32767, Math.floor(inputData[i] * 32767)));
   606→        }
   607→
   608→        const combined = new Int16Array(audioBuffer.length + pcmData.length);
   609→        combined.set(audioBuffer);
   610→        combined.set(pcmData, audioBuffer.length);
   611→        audioBuffer = combined;
   612→
   613→        if (audioBuffer.length >= 24000) {
   614→            const sendBuffer = audioBuffer.slice(0, 24000);
   615→            audioBuffer      = audioBuffer.slice(24000);
   616→
   617→            if (ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   618→                ws.send(sendBuffer.buffer);
   619→
   620→                if (storageAvailable && currentSessionId && sessionStartTime) {
   621→                    const deltaMs = performance.now() - sessionStartTime;
   622→                    await appendChunk(currentSessionId, {
   623→                        seq: chunkSeq++, deltaMs,
   624→                        kind: 'audio', payload: sendBuffer.buffer, byteLength: sendBuffer.byteLength,
   625→                    });
   626→                }
   627→            }
   628→        }
   629→    };
   630→    return processor;
   631→}
   632→
   633→async function initAudio(audioStream) {
   634→    if (audioContext && audioContext.state !== 'closed') {
   635→        try { await audioContext.close(); } catch (_) {}
   636→    }
   637→    audioContext = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
   638→    source       = audioContext.createMediaStreamSource(audioStream);
   639→    processor    = createAudioProcessor();
   640→    source.connect(processor);
   641→    processor.connect(audioContext.destination);
   642→    if (audioContext.state === 'suspended') await audioContext.resume();
   643→}
   644→
   645→function cleanupAudioResources() {
   646→    if (stream) {
   647→        stream.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop());
   648→        stream = null;
   649→    }
   650→    if (audioContext && audioContext.state !== 'closed') {
   651→        audioContext.close().catch(() => {});
   652→        audioContext = null;
   653→    }
   654→    source            = null;
   655→    processor         = null;
   656→    streamInitialized = false;
   657→}
   658→
   659→async function startBrainstormRecording() {
   660→    if (isBrainstormRecording || isListening || isBrainstormProcessing || isReplaying) return;
   661→
   662→    if (!ws || ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN) {
   663→        alert('WebSocket is not connected. Please wait or check the backend URL in Settings.');
   664→        return;
   665→    }
   666→
   667→    try {
   668→        brainstormTranscript = '';
   669→        hideTranscriptBar();
   670→
   671→        // Re-use existing stream if still alive, else reinit
   672→        let streamActive = false;
   673→        try {
   674→            streamActive = streamInitialized && stream && stream.active &&
   675→                           stream.getTracks().every(t => t.readyState === 'live');
   676→        } catch (_) { streamActive = false; }
   677→
   678→        if (!streamActive) {
   679→            cleanupAudioResources();
   680→            stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
   681→                audio: { channelCount: 1, echoCancellation: true, noiseSuppression: true, autoGainControl: true },
   682→            });
   683→            streamInitialized = true;
   684→        }
   685→
   686→        if (!audioContext || audioContext.state === 'closed') {
   687→            await initAudio(stream);
   688→        } else if (audioContext.state === 'suspended') {
   689→            await audioContext.resume();
   690→        }
   691→
   692→        isBrainstormRecording = true;
   693→        if (storageAvailable) await createSession();
   694→
   695→        const selectedModel = modelSelect ? modelSelect.value : 'gpt-realtime-mini-2025-12-15';
   696→        ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'start_recording', model: selectedModel }));
   697→
   698→        startTimer();
   699→        brainstormBtn.classList.add('recording');
   700→        brainstormRing.classList.add('recording');
   701→        brainstormBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', 'true');
   702→        quickBtn.disabled    = true;
   703→        replayButton.disabled = true;
   704→        micHint.textContent  = 'Recording… tap Brainstorm to stop';
   705→        micHint.classList.add('active', 'brainstorm-active');
   706→        micHint.classList.remove('processing');
   707→        showLiveTranscript('', 'brainstorm');
   708→
   709→    } catch (error) {
   710→        console.error('Error starting Brainstorm:', error);
   711→        isBrainstormRecording = false;
   712→        alert('Error accessing microphone: ' + error.message);
   713→    }
   714→}
   715→
   716→async function stopBrainstormRecording() {
   717→    if (!isBrainstormRecording) return;
   718→
   719→    isStopping            = true;
   720→    isBrainstormRecording = false;
   721→    const durationMs      = sessionStartTime ? performance.now() - sessionStartTime : 0;
   722→
   723→    stopTimer();
   724→    brainstormBtn.classList.remove('recording');
   725→    brainstormRing.classList.remove('recording');
   726→    brainstormBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', 'false');
   727→    brainstormBtn.disabled = true; // keep disabled until WS idle
   728→
   729→    micHint.textContent = 'Processing…';
   730→    micHint.classList.remove('brainstorm-active');
   731→    micHint.classList.add('processing');
   732→
   733→    // Allow any in-flight onaudioprocess callbacks to complete
   734→    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100));
   735→
   736→    // Flush remaining audio buffer
   737→    if (audioBuffer.length > 0 && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   738→        const sendBuffer = audioBuffer.slice();
   739→        ws.send(sendBuffer.buffer);
   740→        if (storageAvailable && currentSessionId && sessionStartTime) {
   741→            const deltaMs = performance.now() - sessionStartTime;
   742→            await appendChunk(currentSessionId, {
   743→                seq: chunkSeq++, deltaMs,
   744→                kind: 'audio', payload: sendBuffer.buffer, byteLength: sendBuffer.byteLength,
   745→            });
   746→        }
   747→        audioBuffer = new Int16Array(0);
   748→    }
   749→
   750→    isStopping = false;
   751→
   752→    // Small delay to ensure all audio sent before stop signal
   753→    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
   754→    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'stop_recording' }));
   755→
   756→    if (storageAvailable && currentSessionId) {
   757→        await completeSession(currentSessionId, durationMs);
   758→        currentSessionId  = null;
   759→        sessionStartTime  = null;
   760→        chunkSeq          = 0;
   761→    }
   762→
   763→    // Switch to processing state — WS idle handler will finish the flow
   764→    isBrainstormProcessing    = true;
   765→    _awaitingBrainstormResult = true;
   766→    liveText.textContent      = 'Processing…';
   767→    liveText.classList.remove('has-text');
   768→}
   769→
   770→brainstormBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
   771→    if (isBrainstormRecording) {
   772→        stopBrainstormRecording();
   773→    } else if (!isListening && !isBrainstormProcessing && !isReplaying) {
   774→        startBrainstormRecording();
   775→    }
   776→});
   777→
   778→/* ===================================================
   779→   REPLAY — sends stored IndexedDB audio through WS
   780→   =================================================== */
   781→
   782→async function replayLastRecording() {
   783→    if (isBrainstormRecording || isReplaying || isListening || isBrainstormProcessing) return;
   784→
   785→    const session = await getLatestCompletedSession();
   786→    if (!session) {
   787→        alert('No completed recording found to replay.');
   788→        return;
   789→    }
   790→
   791→    isReplaying              = true;
   792→    quickBtn.disabled        = true;
   793→    brainstormBtn.disabled   = true;
   794→    replayButton.disabled    = true;
   795→    replayButton.classList.add('replaying');
   796→    brainstormTranscript     = '';
   797→
   798→    try {
   799→        hideTranscriptBar();
   800→        const chunks = await getSessionChunks(session.id);
   801→        if (chunks.length === 0) throw new Error('No audio chunks found for session');
   802→
   803→        // Wait for WS if needed
   804→        if (!wsConnected || ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN) {
   805→            await new Promise(resolve => {
   806→                const check = setInterval(() => {
   807→                    if (wsConnected && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) { clearInterval(check); resolve(); }
   808→                }, 100);
   809→            });
   810→        }
   811→
   812→        const selectedModel = modelSelect ? modelSelect.value : 'gpt-realtime-mini-2025-12-15';
   813→        ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'start_recording', model: selectedModel }));
   814→        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200));
   815→
   816→        for (const chunk of chunks.filter(c => c.kind === 'audio' && c.payload)) {
   817→            if (ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   818→                ws.send(chunk.payload);
   819→            } else {
   820→                throw new Error('WebSocket closed during replay');
   821→            }
   822→        }
   823→
   824→        ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'stop_recording' }));
   825→
   826→        isBrainstormProcessing    = true;
   827→        _awaitingBrainstormResult = true;
   828→        micHint.textContent       = 'Processing replay…';
   829→        micHint.classList.add('active', 'processing');
   830→        micHint.classList.remove('brainstorm-active');
   831→        showLiveTranscript('Processing replay…', 'brainstorm');
   832→
   833→    } catch (error) {
   834→        console.error('Replay error:', error);
   835→        alert('Error replaying recording: ' + error.message);
   836→        isBrainstormProcessing    = false;
   837→        _awaitingBrainstormResult = false;
   838→        micHint.textContent       = '';
   839→        micHint.classList.remove('active', 'processing');
   840→        quickBtn.disabled        = false;
   841→        brainstormBtn.disabled   = false;
   842→    } finally {
   843→        isReplaying = false;
   844→        replayButton.classList.remove('replaying');
   845→        updateReplayButtonState();
   846→        // quickBtn/brainstormBtn re-enabled by WS idle handler if processing started
   847→        if (!isBrainstormProcessing) {
   848→            quickBtn.disabled      = false;
   849→            brainstormBtn.disabled = false;
   850→        }
   851→    }
   852→}
   853→
   854→replayButton.onclick = replayLastRecording;
   855→
   856→function updateReplayButtonState() {
   857→    if (!replayButton) return;
   858→
   859→    if (!storageAvailable) {
   860→        replayButton.disabled = true;
   861→        replayButton.title    = 'Local storage not available';
   862→        return;
   863→    }
   864→    if (isBrainstormRecording || isReplaying || isListening || isBrainstormProcessing) {
   865→        replayButton.disabled = true;
   866→        return;
   867→    }
   868→
   869→    getLatestCompletedSession().then(session => {
   870→        if (!isReplaying) {
   871→            replayButton.disabled = !session;
   872→            replayButton.title    = session ? 'Replay last recording' : 'No recording to replay';
   873→            replayButton.classList.remove('replaying');
   874→        }
   875→    });
   876→}
   877→
   878→/* ===================================================
   879→   INDEXEDDB — stores PCM16 chunks for replay
   880→   =================================================== */
   881→
   882→function createDBStores(event) {
   883→    const d = event.target.result;
   884→    if (!d.objectStoreNames.contains('sessions')) {
   885→        const s = d.createObjectStore('sessions', { keyPath: 'id', autoIncrement: true });
   886→        s.createIndex('status',    'status',    { unique: false });
   887→        s.createIndex('createdAt', 'createdAt', { unique: false });
   888→    }
   889→    if (!d.objectStoreNames.contains('chunks')) {
   890→        const c = d.createObjectStore('chunks', { keyPath: 'id', autoIncrement: true });
   891→        c.createIndex('sessionId', 'sessionId', { unique: false });
   892→        c.createIndex('seq',       'seq',       { unique: false });
   893→    }
   894→}
   895→
   896→async function initIndexedDB() {
   897→    return new Promise((resolve) => {
   898→        const request = indexedDB.open('brainwave-replay', 1);
   899→
   900→        request.onerror = () => {
   901→            console.warn('IndexedDB not available, replay disabled');
   902→            storageAvailable = false;
   903→            resolve(false);
   904→        };
   905→
   906→        request.onsuccess = () => {
   907→            db = request.result;
   908→            if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('sessions') || !db.objectStoreNames.contains('chunks')) {
   909→                db.close();
   910→                const del = indexedDB.deleteDatabase('brainwave-replay');
   911→                del.onsuccess = () => {
   912→                    const reopen = indexedDB.open('brainwave-replay', 1);
   913→                    reopen.onsuccess       = () => { db = reopen.result; storageAvailable = true; updateReplayButtonState(); resolve(true); };
   914→                    reopen.onerror         = () => { storageAvailable = false; resolve(false); };
   915→                    reopen.onupgradeneeded = createDBStores;
   916→                };
   917→                del.onerror = () => { storageAvailable = false; resolve(false); };
   918→                return;
   919→            }
   920→            storageAvailable = true;
   921→            updateReplayButtonState();
   922→            resolve(true);
   923→        };
   924→
   925→        request.onupgradeneeded = createDBStores;
   926→    });
   927→}
   928→
   929→async function createSession() {
   930→    if (!db) return null;
   931→    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
   932→        const tx    = db.transaction(['sessions'], 'readwrite');
   933→        const store = tx.objectStore('sessions');
   934→        const req   = store.add({ createdAt: new Date(), status: 'recording', sampleRate: 24000, channelCount: 1, durationMs: 0 });
   935→        req.onsuccess = () => {
   936→            currentSessionId  = req.result;
   937→            sessionStartTime  = performance.now();
   938→            chunkSeq          = 0;
   939→            appendChunk(currentSessionId, { seq: 0, deltaMs: 0, kind: 'start', payload: null, byteLength: 0 });
   940→            resolve(currentSessionId);
   941→        };
   942→        req.onerror = () => reject(req.error);
   943→    });
   944→}
   945→
   946→async function appendChunk(sessionId, chunk) {
   947→    if (!db || !sessionId) return;
   948→    return new Promise((resolve) => {
   949→        const tx    = db.transaction(['chunks'], 'readwrite');
   950→        const store = tx.objectStore('chunks');
   951→        const req   = store.add({ sessionId, seq: chunk.seq, deltaMs: chunk.deltaMs, kind: chunk.kind, payload: chunk.payload, byteLength: chunk.byteLength });
   952→        req.onsuccess = () => resolve();
   953→        req.onerror   = () => resolve(); // don't fail recording on storage error
   954→    });
   955→}
   956→
   957→async function completeSession(sessionId, durationMs) {
   958→    if (!db || !sessionId) return;
   959→    return new Promise((resolve) => {
   960→        const tx            = db.transaction(['sessions', 'chunks'], 'readwrite');
   961→        const sessionsStore = tx.objectStore('sessions');
   962→        const chunksStore   = tx.objectStore('chunks');
   963→        const req           = sessionsStore.get(sessionId);
   964→        req.onsuccess = () => {
   965→            const sess = req.result;
   966→            sess.status    = 'completed';
   967→            sess.durationMs = durationMs;
   968→            sessionsStore.put(sess);
   969→            chunksStore.add({ sessionId, seq: chunkSeq++, deltaMs: durationMs, kind: 'stop', payload: null, byteLength: 0 });
   970→            enforceQuota({ maxSessions: 5 });
   971→            resolve();
   972→        };
   973→        req.onerror = () => resolve();
   974→    });
   975→}
   976→
   977→async function enforceQuota({ maxSessions }) {
   978→    if (!db) return;
   979→    const tx            = db.transaction(['sessions', 'chunks'], 'readwrite');
   980→    const sessionsStore = tx.objectStore('sessions');
   981→    const sessions      = [];
   982→    sessionsStore.index('createdAt').openCursor().onsuccess = (event) => {
   983→        const cursor = event.target.result;
   984→        if (cursor) { sessions.push(cursor.value); cursor.continue(); }
   985→        else {
   986→            sessions.sort((a, b) => a.createdAt - b.createdAt);
   987→            while (sessions.length > maxSessions) deleteSession(sessions.shift().id);
   988→        }
   989→    };
   990→}
   991→
   992→async function deleteSession(sessionId) {
   993→    if (!db) return;
   994→    const tx            = db.transaction(['sessions', 'chunks'], 'readwrite');
   995→    const sessionsStore = tx.objectStore('sessions');
   996→    const chunksStore   = tx.objectStore('chunks');
   997→    chunksStore.index('sessionId').openKeyCursor(IDBKeyRange.only(sessionId)).onsuccess = (event) => {
   998→        const cursor = event.target.result;
   999→        if (cursor) { chunksStore.delete(cursor.primaryKey); cursor.continue(); }
  1000→    };
  1001→    sessionsStore.delete(sessionId);
  1002→}
  1003→
  1004→async function getLatestCompletedSession() {
  1005→    if (!db) return null;
  1006→    return new Promise((resolve) => {
  1007→        const tx    = db.transaction(['sessions'], 'readonly');
  1008→        const req   = tx.objectStore('sessions').index('status').getAll('completed');
  1009→        req.onsuccess = () => {
  1010→            const sessions = req.result;
  1011→            if (!sessions.length) { resolve(null); return; }
  1012→            sessions.sort((a, b) => b.createdAt - a.createdAt);
  1013→            resolve(sessions[0]);
  1014→        };
  1015→        req.onerror = () => resolve(null);
  1016→    });
  1017→}
  1018→
  1019→async function getSessionChunks(sessionId) {
  1020→    if (!db || !sessionId) return [];
  1021→    return new Promise((resolve) => {
  1022→        const tx  = db.transaction(['chunks'], 'readonly');
  1023→        const req = tx.objectStore('chunks').index('sessionId').getAll(sessionId);
  1024→        req.onsuccess = () => {
  1025→            const chunks = req.result;
  1026→            chunks.sort((a, b) => a.seq - b.seq);
  1027→            resolve(chunks);
  1028→        };
  1029→        req.onerror = () => resolve([]);
  1030→    });
  1031→}
  1032→
  1033→/* ===== KEYBOARD SHORTCUT ===== */
  1034→document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
  1035→    if (event.code === 'Space') {
  1036→        const el = document.activeElement;
  1037→        if (!el.tagName.match(/INPUT|TEXTAREA|SELECT/) && !el.isContentEditable) {
  1038→            event.preventDefault();
  1039→            if (isListening) {
  1040→                stopQuickMode();
  1041→            } else if (isBrainstormRecording) {
  1042→                stopBrainstormRecording();
  1043→            } else if (!isBrainstormProcessing && !isReplaying) {
  1044→                startQuickMode();
  1045→            }
  1046→        }
  1047→    }
  1048→});
  1049→
  1050→/* ===== INIT ===== */
  1051→document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async () => {
  1052→    await initIndexedDB();
  1053→
  1054→    if (!SpeechRecognition) {
  1055→        notSupported.hidden = false;
  1056→        quickBtn.disabled   = true;
  1057→        quickBtn.title      = 'Speech recognition not supported in this browser';
  1058→    } else {
  1059→        initRecognition();
  1060→    }
  1061→
  1062→    initializeWebSocket();
  1063→});
  1064→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>
