22\u2192from config import OPENAI_REALTIME_MODEL, OPENAI_REALTIME_MODALITIES\n    23\u2192\n    24\u2192# Gemini transcription import is deferred to runtime inside the endpoint\n    25\u2192\n    26\u2192# Configure logging\n    27\u2192logging.basicConfig(\n    28\u2192    level=logging.INFO,\n    29\u2192    format='%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s'\n    30\u2192)\n    31\u2192logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n    32\u2192\n    33\u2192# Pydantic models for request and response schemas\n    34\u2192class ReadabilityRequest(BaseModel):\n    35\u2192    text: str = Field(..., description=\"The text to improve readability for.\")\n    36\u2192\n    37\u2192class ReadabilityResponse(BaseModel):\n    38\u2192    enhanced_text: str = Field(..., description=\"The text with improved readability.\")\n    39\u2192\n    40\u2192class CorrectnessRequest(BaseModel):\n    41\u2192    text: str = Field(..., description=\"The text to check for factual correctness.\")\n    42\u2192\n    43\u2192class CorrectnessResponse(BaseModel):\n    44\u2192    analysis: str = Field(..., description=\"The factual correctness analysis.\")\n    45\u2192\n    46\u2192class AskAIRequest(BaseModel):\n    47\u2192    text: str = Field(..., description=\"The question to ask AI.\")\n    48\u2192\n    49\u2192class AskAIResponse(BaseModel):\n    50\u2192    answer: str = Field(..., description=\"AI's answer to the question.\")\n    51\u2192\n    52\u2192app = FastAPI()\n    53\u2192\n    54\u2192@app.get(\"/health\")\n    55\u2192async def health_check():\n    56\u2192    return {\"status\": \"ok\"}\n    57\u2192\n    58\u2192OPENAI_API_KEY = os.getenv(\"OPENAI_API_KEY\")\n    59\u2192if not OPENAI_API_KEY:\n    60\u2192    logger.error(\"OPENAI_API_KEY is not set in environment variables.\")\n    61\u2192    raise EnvironmentError(\"OPENAI_API_KEY is not set.\")\n    62\u2192\n    63\u2192# Initialize with a default model\n    64\u2192llm_processor = get_llm_processor(\"gpt-4o\")  # Default processor\n    65\u2192\n    66\u2192@app.get(\"/static/main.js\")\n    67\u2192async def get_main_js():\n    68\u2192    logger.info(\"Serving main.js via custom route\")\n    69\u2192    headers = {\"Cache-Control\": \"no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0\"}\n    70\u2192    return FileResponse(\"static/main.js\", media_type=\"application/javascript\", headers=headers)\n    71\u2192\n    72\u2192app.mount(\"/static\", StaticFiles(directory=\"static\"), name=\"static\")\n    73\u2192\n    74\u2192@app.get(\"/\", response_class=HTMLResponse)\n    75\u2192async def get_realtime_page(request: Request):\n    76\u2192    # Default to WebSocket version (old version)\n    77\u2192    return FileResponse(\"static/realtime.html\")\n    78\u2192\n    79\u2192@app.get(\"/old\", response_class=HTMLResponse)\n    80\u2192async def get_old_ws_page(request: Request):\n    81\u2192    # Redirect to root (WebSocket version)\n    82\u2192    return RedirectResponse(url=\"/\", status_code=302)\n    83\u2192\n    84\u2192\n    85\u2192class AudioProcessor:\n    86\u2192    def __init__(self, target_sample_rate=24000):\n    87\u2192        self.target_sample_rate = target_sample_rate\n    88\u2192        self.source_sample_rate = 48000  # Most common sample rate for microphones\n    89\u2192        \n    90\u2192    def process_audio_chunk(self, audio_data):\n    91\u2192        # Convert binary audio data to Int16 array\n    92\u2192        pcm_data = np.frombuffer(audio_data, dtype=np.int16)\n    93\u2192        \n    94\u2192        # Convert to float32 for better precision during resampling\n    95\u2192        float_data = pcm_data.astype(np.float32) / 32768.0\n    96\u2192        \n    97\u2192        # Resample from 48kHz to 24kHz\n    98\u2192        resampled_data = scipy.signal.resample_poly(\n    99\u2192            float_data, \n   100\u2192            self.target_sample_rate, \n   101\u2192            self.source_sample_rate\n   102\u2192        )\n   103\u2192        \n   104\u2192        # Convert back to int16 while preserving amplitude\n   105\u2192        resampled_int16 = (resampled_data * 32768.0).clip(-32768, 32767).astype(np.int16)\n   106\u2192        return resampled_int16.tobytes()\n   107\u2192\n   108\u2192    def save_audio_buffer(self, audio_buffer, filename):\n   109\u2192        with wave.open(filename, 'wb') as wf:\n   110\u2192            wf.setnchannels(1)  # Mono audio\n   111\u2192            wf.setsampwidth(2)  # 2 bytes per sample (16-bit)\n   112\u2192            wf.setframerate(self.target_sample_rate)\n   113\u2192            wf.writeframes(b''.join(audio_buffer))\n   114\u2192        logger.info(f\"Saved audio buffer to {filename}\")\n   115\u2192\n   116\u2192@app.websocket(\"/api/v1/ws\")\n   117\u2192async def websocket_endpoint(websocket: WebSocket):\n   118\u2192    logger.info(\"New WebSocket connection attempt\")\n   119\u2192    await websocket.accept()\n   120\u2192    logger.info(\"WebSocket connection accepted, starting receive_messages task\")\n   121\u2192    \n   122\u2192    # Add initial status update here\n   123\u2192    await websocket.send_text(json.dumps({\n   124\u2192        \"type\": \"status\",\n   125\u2192        \"status\": \"idle\"  # Set initial status to idle (blue)\n   126\u2192    }, ensure_ascii=False))\n   127\u2192    \n   128\u2192    client = None\n   129\u2192    audio_processor = AudioProcessor()\n   130\u2192    audio_buffer = []\n   131\u2192    recording_stopped = asyncio.Event()\n   132\u2192    openai_ready = asyncio.Event()\n   133\u2192    pending_audio_chunks = []\n   134\u2192    clear_on_next_response = False\n   135\u2192    is_recording = False\n   136\u2192    marker_prefix = \"\u4e0b\u9762\u662f\u4e0d\u6539\u53d8\u8bed\u8a00\u7684\u8bed\u97f3\u8bc6\u522b\u7ed3\u679c\uff1a\\n\\n\"\n   137\u2192    max_prefix_deltas = 20\n   138\u2192    response_buffer = []\n   139\u2192    marker_seen = False\n   140\u2192    delta_counter = 0\n   141\u2192\n   142\u2192    async def emit_text_delta(content: str):\n   143\u2192        if content and websocket.client_state == WebSocketState.CONNECTED:\n   144\u2192            await websocket.send_text(json.dumps({\n   145\u2192                \"type\": \"text\",\n   146\u2192                \"content\": content,\n   147\u2192                \"isNewResponse\": False\n   148\u2192            }, ensure_ascii=False))\n   149\u2192\n   150\u2192    async def flush_buffer(with_warning: bool = False):\n   151\u2192        nonlocal response_buffer\n   152\u2192        if not response_buffer:\n   153\u2192            return\n   154\u2192        buffered_text = \"\".join(response_buffer)\n   155\u2192        response_buffer = []\n   156\u2192        # Try to remove marker prefix (with or without trailing newlines)\n   157\u2192        if buffered_text.startswith(marker_prefix):\n   158\u2192            buffered_text = buffered_text[len(marker_prefix):]\n   159\u2192        elif buffered_text.startswith(marker_prefix.rstrip('\\n')):\n   160\u2192            # Handle case where prefix doesn't have trailing newlines\n   161\u2192            buffered_text = buffered_text[len(marker_prefix.rstrip('\\n')):].lstrip('\\n')\n   162\u2192        # Also check if prefix appears anywhere in the text\n   163\u2192        marker_index = buffered_text.find(marker_prefix)\n   164\u2192        if marker_index != -1:\n   165\u2192            buffered_text = buffered_text[marker_index + len(marker_prefix):]\n   166\u2192        else:\n   167\u2192            marker_index = buffered_text.find(marker_prefix.rstrip('\\n'))\n   168\u2192            if marker_index != -1:\n   169\u2192                buffered_text = buffered_text[marker_index + len(marker_prefix.rstrip('\\n')):].lstrip('\\n')\n   170\u2192        if with_warning and not buffered_text:\n   171\u2192            logger.warning(\"Buffered text discarded after removing marker prefix.\")\n   172\u2192        await emit_text_delta(buffered_text)\n   173\u2192    \n   174\u2192    async def create_realtime_client(model: str = None) -> OpenAIRealtimeAudioTextClient:\n   175\u2192        \"\"\"Create OpenAI realtime client with given model.\"\"\"\n   176\u2192        selected_model = model or OPENAI_REALTIME_MODEL\n   177\u2192        logger.info(f\"Creating OpenAI client with model: {selected_model}\")\n   178\u2192        return OpenAIRealtimeAudioTextClient(OPENAI_API_KEY, model=selected_model)\n   179\u2192    \n   180\u2192    async def initialize_realtime_client(model: str = None):\n   181\u2192        nonlocal client\n   182\u2192        try:\n   183\u2192            openai_ready.clear()\n   184\u2192            client = await create_realtime_client(model=model)\n   185\u2192            await client.connect(modalities=OPENAI_REALTIME_MODALITIES)\n   186\u2192            logger.info(\"Successfully connected to OpenAI client\")\n   187\u2192            \n   188\u2192            # Register handlers after client is initialized\n   189\u2192            client.register_handler(\"session.updated\", lambda data: handle_generic_event(\"session.updated\", data))\n   190\u2192            client.register_handler(\"input_audio_buffer.cleared\", lambda data: handle_generic_event(\"input_audio_buffer.cleared\", data))\n   191\u2192            client.register_handler(\"input_audio_buffer.speech_started\", lambda data: handle_generic_event(\"input_audio_buffer.speech_started\", data))\n   192\u2192            client.register_handler(\"rate_limits.updated\", lambda data: handle_generic_event(\"rate_limits.updated\", data))\n   193\u2192            client.register_handler(\"response.output_item.added\", lambda data: handle_generic_event(\"response.output_item.added\", data))\n   194\u2192            client.register_handler(\"conversation.item.created\", lambda data: handle_generic_event(\"conversation.item.created\", data))\n   195\u2192            client.register_handler(\"response.content_part.added\", lambda data: handle_generic_event(\"response.content_part.added\", data))\n   196\u2192            client.register_handler(\"response.text.done\", lambda data: handle_generic_event(\"response.text.done\", data))\n   197\u2192            client.register_handler(\"response.content_part.done\", lambda data: handle_generic_event(\"response.content_part.done\", data))\n   198\u2192            client.register_handler(\"response.output_item.done\", lambda data: handle_generic_event(\"response.output_item.done\", data))\n   199\u2192            client.register_handler(\"response.done\", lambda data: handle_response_done(data))\n   200\u2192            client.register_handler(\"error\", lambda data: handle_error(data))\n   201\u2192            client.register_handler(\"response.text.delta\", lambda data: handle_text_delta(data))\n   202\u2192            # GA: response.text.delta \u2192 response.output_text.delta\n   203\u2192            client.register_handler(\"response.output_text.delta\", lambda data: handle_text_delta(data))\n   204\u2192            client.register_handler(\"response.created\", lambda data: handle_response_created(data))\n   205\u2192            client.register_handler(\"input_audio_buffer.speech_stopped\", lambda data: handle_generic_event(\"input_audio_buffer.speech_stopped\", data))\n   206\u2192            client.register_handler(\"input_audio_buffer.committed\", lambda data: handle_generic_event(\"input_audio_buffer.committed\", data))\n   207\u2192            client.register_handler(\"conversation.item.added\", lambda data: handle_generic_event(\"conversation.item.added\", data))\n   208\u2192            client.register_handler(\"conversation.item.input_audio_transcription.completed\", lambda data: handle_generic_event(\"conversation.item.input_audio_transcription.completed\", data))\n   209\u2192            client.register_handler(\"response.output_audio.done\", lambda data: handle_generic_event(\"response.output_audio.done\", data))\n   210\u2192            client.register_handler(\"ping\", lambda data: handle_generic_event(\"ping\", data))\n   211\u2192            \n   212\u2192            openai_ready.set()  # Set ready flag after successful initialization\n   213\u2192            await websocket.send_text(json.dumps({\n   214\u2192                \"type\": \"status\",\n   215\u2192                \"status\": \"connected\"\n   216\u2192            }, ensure_ascii=False))\n   217\u2192            return True\n   218\u2192        except Exception as e:\n   219\u2192            logger.error(f\"Failed to connect to OpenAI client: {e}\")\n   220\u2192            openai_ready.clear()  # Ensure flag is cleared on failure\n   221\u2192            await websocket.send_text(json.dumps({\n   222\u2192                \"type\": \"error\",\n   223\u2192                \"content\": \"Failed to initialize OpenAI connection\"\n   224\u2192            }, ensure_ascii=False))\n   225\u2192            return False\n   226\u2192\n   227\u2192    # Move the handler definitions here (before initialize_realtime_client)\n   228\u2192    async def handle_text_delta(data):\n   229\u2192        nonlocal response_buffer, marker_seen, delta_counter\n   230\u2192        try:\n   231\u2192            if websocket.client_state != WebSocketState.CONNECTED:\n   232\u2192                logger.warning(\"WebSocket not connected, ignoring text delta\")\n   233\u2192                return\n   234\u2192\n   235\u2192            delta = data.get(\"delta\", \"\")\n   236\u2192            logger.debug(f\"Received text delta: {repr(delta[:50])} (marker_seen={marker_seen}, buffer_size={len(response_buffer)}, delta_counter={delta_counter})\")\n   237\u2192\n   238\u2192            if marker_seen:\n   239\u2192                if delta:\n   240\u2192                    await emit_text_delta(delta)\n   241\u2192                    logger.debug(f\"Handled response.text.delta (passthrough): {repr(delta[:50])}\")\n   242\u2192                return\n   243\u2192\n   244\u2192            if delta:\n   245\u2192                response_buffer.append(delta)\n   246\u2192                delta_counter += 1\n   247\u2192\n   248\u2192            joined = \"\".join(response_buffer)\n   249\u2192            # Try to find marker prefix (with or without newlines)\n   250\u2192            marker_index = joined.find(marker_prefix)\n   251\u2192            # Also try without the trailing newlines in case x.ai returns differently\n   252\u2192            if marker_index == -1:\n   253\u2192                marker_prefix_no_newline = marker_prefix.rstrip('\\n')\n   254\u2192                marker_index = joined.find(marker_prefix_no_newline)\n   255\u2192                if marker_index != -1:\n   256\u2192                    # Found prefix without trailing newlines, skip past it\n   257\u2192                    marker_seen = True\n   258\u2192                    remaining = joined[marker_index + len(marker_prefix_no_newline):].lstrip('\\n')\n   259\u2192                    response_buffer = []\n   260\u2192                    if remaining:\n   261\u2192                        await emit_text_delta(remaining)\n   262\u2192                    logger.info(f\"Handled response.text.delta (marker detected without newline), emitted: {repr(remaining[:50])}\")\n   263\u2192                    return\n   264\u2192\n   265\u2192            if marker_index != -1:\n   266\u2192                marker_seen = True\n   267\u2192                remaining = joined[marker_index + len(marker_prefix):]\n   268\u2192                response_buffer = []\n   269\u2192                await emit_text_delta(remaining)\n   270\u2192                logger.info(f\"Handled response.text.delta (marker detected), emitted: {repr(remaining[:50])}\")\n   271\u2192                return\n   272\u2192\n   273\u2192            if delta_counter >= max_prefix_deltas:\n   274\u2192                marker_seen = True\n   275\u2192                await flush_buffer(with_warning=True)\n   276\u2192                logger.warning(\"Marker prefix not detected after max deltas; emitted buffered text.\")\n   277\u2192            else:\n   278\u2192                logger.debug(f\"Handled response.text.delta (buffering), total buffer length: {len(joined)}\")\n   279\u2192        except Exception as e:\n   280\u2192            logger.error(f\"Error in handle_text_delta: {str(e)}\", exc_info=True)\n   281\u2192\n   282\u2192    async def handle_response_created(data):\n   283\u2192        # Only clear UI on the first response after an explicit Start from the user\n   284\u2192        nonlocal clear_on_next_response, response_buffer, marker_seen, delta_counter\n   285\u2192        response_buffer = []\n   286\u2192        marker_seen = False\n   287\u2192        delta_counter = 0\n   288\u2192        logger.info(f\"Handled response.created, clearing buffer and resetting marker state\")\n   289\u2192        if clear_on_next_response:\n   290\u2192            await websocket.send_text(json.dumps({\n   291\u2192                \"type\": \"text\",\n   292\u2192                \"content\": \"\",\n   293\u2192                \"isNewResponse\": True\n   294\u2192            }, ensure_ascii=False))\n   295\u2192            clear_on_next_response = False\n   296\u2192        logger.info(\"Handled response.created\")\n   297\u2192\n   298\u2192    async def handle_error(data):\n   299\u2192        error_msg = data.get(\"error\", {}).get(\"message\", \"Unknown error\")\n   300\u2192        logger.error(f\"OpenAI error: {error_msg}\")\n   301\u2192        await websocket.send_text(json.dumps({\n   302\u2192            \"type\": \"error\",\n   303\u2192            \"content\": error_msg\n   304\u2192        }, ensure_ascii=False))\n   305\u2192        # Ensure clients exit generating state even if OpenAI aborts the turn\n   306\u2192        await websocket.send_text(json.dumps({\n   307\u2192            \"type\": \"status\",\n   308\u2192            \"status\": \"idle\"\n   309\u2192        }, ensure_ascii=False))\n   310\u2192        logger.info(\"Handled error message from OpenAI\")\n   311\u2192\n   312\u2192    async def handle_response_done(data):\n   313\u2192        nonlocal client, response_buffer, marker_seen\n   314\u2192        logger.info(f\"Handled response.done (marker_seen={marker_seen}, buffer_size={len(response_buffer)})\")\n   315\u2192        if not marker_seen and response_buffer:\n   316\u2192            logger.info(\"Flushing remaining buffer content\")\n   317\u2192            await flush_buffer()\n   318\u2192            marker_seen = True\n   319\u2192        \n   320\u2192        recording_stopped.set()\n   321\u2192        \n   322\u2192        # Update frontend status to idle\n   323\u2192        try:\n   324\u2192            await websocket.send_text(json.dumps({\n   325\u2192                \"type\": \"status\",\n   326\u2192                \"status\": \"idle\"\n   327\u2192            }, ensure_ascii=False))\n   328\u2192        except Exception as e:\n   329\u2192            logger.error(f\"Error sending status after response done: {str(e)}\", exc_info=True)\n   330\u2192        \n   331\u2192        # Close the OpenAI client connection (not the user WebSocket)\n   332\u2192        # The user WebSocket should remain open for the next request\n   333\u2192        if client:\n   334\u2192            logger.info(\"Response completed, closing OpenAI client connection\")\n   335\u2192            try:\n   336\u2192                await client.close()\n   337\u2192                client = None\n   338\u2192                openai_ready.clear()\n   339\u2192            except Exception as e:\n   340\u2192                logger.error(f\"Error closing OpenAI client: {str(e)}\", exc_info=True)\n   341\u2192\n   342\u2192    async def handle_generic_event(event_type, data):\n   343\u2192        logger.info(f\"Handled {event_type} with data: {json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False)}\")\n   344\u2192\n   345\u2192    # Create a queue to handle incoming audio chunks\n   346\u2192    audio_queue = asyncio.Queue()\n   347\u2192\n   348\u2192    async def receive_messages():\n   349\u2192        nonlocal client\n   350\u2192        logger.info(\"receive_messages task started\")\n   351\u2192        \n   352\u2192        try:\n   353\u2192            while True:\n   354\u2192                if websocket.client_state == WebSocketState.DISCONNECTED:\n   355\u2192                    logger.info(\"WebSocket client disconnected\")\n   356\u2192                    openai_ready.clear()\n   357\u2192                    break\n   358\u2192                    \n   359\u2192                try:\n   360\u2192                    # Add timeout to prevent infinite waiting\n   361\u2192                    logger.info(\"Waiting for message from client (timeout=30s)...\")\n   362\u2192                    data = await asyncio.wait_for(websocket.receive(), timeout=30.0)\n   363\u2192                    logger.info(f\"Received data from client: {list(data.keys())}\")\n   364\u2192                except asyncio.CancelledError:\n   365\u2192                    logger.info(\"Receive messages task cancelled\")\n   366\u2192                    raise\n   367\u2192                except asyncio.TimeoutError:\n   368\u2192                    logger.debug(\"No message received for 30 seconds\")\n   369\u2192                    continue\n   370\u2192                except Exception as e:\n   371\u2192                    logger.error(f\"Error receiving message: {str(e)}\", exc_info=True)\n   372\u2192                    break\n   373\u2192                \n   374\u2192                if \"bytes\" in data:\n   375\u2192                    processed_audio = audio_processor.process_audio_chunk(data[\"bytes\"])\n   376\u2192                    if not openai_ready.is_set():\n   377\u2192                        logger.debug(\"OpenAI not ready, buffering audio chunk\")\n   378\u2192                        pending_audio_chunks.append(processed_audio)\n   379\u2192                    elif client and is_recording:\n   380\u2192                        await client.send_audio(processed_audio)\n   381\u2192                        await websocket.send_text(json.dumps({\n   382\u2192                            \"type\": \"status\",\n   383\u2192                            \"status\": \"connected\"\n   384\u2192                        }, ensure_ascii=False))\n   385\u2192                        logger.debug(f\"Sent audio chunk, size: {len(processed_audio)} bytes\")\n   386\u2192                    else:\n   387\u2192                        logger.warning(\"Received audio but client is not initialized\")\n   388\u2192                            \n   389\u2192                elif \"text\" in data:\n   390\u2192                    msg = json.loads(data[\"text\"])\n   391\u2192                    logger.info(f\"Received message from client: {msg.get('type')}\")\n   392\u2192                    \n   393\u2192                    if msg.get(\"type\") == \"start_recording\":\n   394\u2192                        logger.info(\"Processing start_recording request\")\n   395\u2192                        \n   396\u2192                        # Update status to connecting while initializing realtime client\n   397\u2192                        await websocket.send_text(json.dumps({\n   398\u2192                            \"type\": \"status\",\n   399\u2192                            \"status\": \"connecting\"\n   400\u2192                        }, ensure_ascii=False))\n   401\u2192                        model = msg.get(\"model\")\n   402\u2192                        logger.info(f\"Received start_recording: model={model}\")\n   403\u2192                        if not await initialize_realtime_client(model=model):\n   404\u2192                            continue\n   405\u2192                        recording_stopped.clear()\n   406\u2192                        pending_audio_chunks.clear()\n   407\u2192                        # Immediately clear transcript for a new client-initiated request\n   408\u2192                        await websocket.send_text(json.dumps({\n   409\u2192                            \"type\": \"text\",\n   410\u2192                            \"content\": \"\",\n   411\u2192                            \"isNewResponse\": True\n   412\u2192                        }, ensure_ascii=False))\n   413\u2192                        clear_on_next_response = False\n   414\u2192                        is_recording = True\n   415\u2192                        \n   416\u2192                        # Send any buffered chunks\n   417\u2192                        if pending_audio_chunks and client:\n   418\u2192                            logger.info(f\"Sending {len(pending_audio_chunks)} buffered chunks\")\n   419\u2192                            for chunk in pending_audio_chunks:\n   420\u2192                                await client.send_audio(chunk)\n   421\u2192                            pending_audio_chunks.clear()\n   422\u2192                        \n   423\u2192                    elif msg.get(\"type\") == \"stop_recording\":\n   424\u2192                        # On explicit Stop, force-commit and force-create a response, then wait for completion.\n   425\u2192                        if client:\n   426\u2192                            # Immediately stop accepting further audio for this turn\n   427\u2192                            is_recording = False\n   428\u2192                            try:\n   429\u2192                                await client.commit_audio()\n   430\u2192                                logger.info(\"Audio committed, starting response...\")\n   431\u2192                                await client.start_response(PROMPTS['paraphrase-gpt-realtime-enhanced'])\n   432\u2192                                logger.info(\"Response started successfully\")\n   433\u2192                            except Exception as e:\n   434\u2192                                logger.error(f\"Error committing/starting response on stop: {str(e)}\", exc_info=True)\n   435\u2192                                # If we fail to kick off a response, surface that we're no longer recording\n   436\u2192                                await websocket.send_text(json.dumps({\n   437\u2192                                    \"type\": \"status\",\n   438\u2192                                    \"status\": \"idle\"\n   439\u2192                                }, ensure_ascii=False))\n   440\u2192                                continue\n   441\u2192                            # Wait until the response is finished\n   442\u2192                            await recording_stopped.wait()\n   443\u2192                \n   444\u2192        finally:\n   445\u2192            # Cleanup when the loop exits\n   446\u2192            if client:\n   447\u2192                try:\n   448\u2192                    await client.close()\n   449\u2192                except Exception as e:\n   450\u2192                    logger.error(f\"Error closing client in receive_messages: {str(e)}\")\n   451\u2192            logger.info(\"Receive messages loop ended\")\n   452\u2192\n   453\u2192    async def send_audio_messages():\n   454\u2192        try:\n   455\u2192            while True:\n   456\u2192                \n   457\u2192                try:\n   458\u2192                    processed_audio = await audio_queue.get()\n   459\u2192                    if processed_audio is None:\n   460\u2192                        break\n   461\u2192                    \n   462\u2192                    # Add validation\n   463\u2192                    if len(processed_audio) == 0:\n   464\u2192                        logger.warning(\"Empty audio chunk received, skipping\")\n   465\u2192                        continue\n   466\u2192                    \n   467\u2192                    # Append the processed audio to the buffer\n   468\u2192                    audio_buffer.append(processed_audio)\n   469\u2192\n   470\u2192                    await client.send_audio(processed_audio)\n   471\u2192                    logger.info(f\"Audio chunk sent to OpenAI client, size: {len(processed_audio)} bytes\")\n   472\u2192                    \n   473\u2192                except asyncio.CancelledError:\n   474\u2192                    logger.info(\"Send audio messages task cancelled\")\n   475\u2192                    raise\n   476\u2192                except Exception as e:\n   477\u2192                    logger.error(f\"Error in send_audio_messages: {str(e)}\", exc_info=True)\n   478\u2192                    break\n   479\u2192        except asyncio.CancelledError:\n   480\u2192            logger.info(\"Send audio messages task cancelled\")\n   481\u2192            raise\n   482\u2192\n   483\u2192        # After processing all audio, set the event\n   484\u2192        recording_stopped.set()\n   485\u2192\n   486\u2192    # Start concurrent tasks for receiving and sending\n   487\u2192    receive_task = asyncio.create_task(receive_messages())\n   488\u2192    send_task = asyncio.create_task(send_audio_messages())\n   489\u2192\n   490\u2192    try:\n   491\u2192        # Wait for both tasks to complete\n   492\u2192        await asyncio.gather(receive_task, send_task)\n   493\u2192    except Exception as e:\n   494\u2192        logger.error(f\"Error in WebSocket connection: {e}\", exc_info=True)\n   495\u2192    finally:\n   496\u2192        # Cancel background tasks before cleanup\n   497\u2192        receive_task.cancel()\n   498\u2192        send_task.cancel()\n   499\u2192        \n   500\u2192        # Wait for tasks to be cancelled (with timeout)\n   501\u2192        try:\n   502\u2192            await asyncio.wait_for(asyncio.gather(receive_task, send_task, return_exceptions=True), timeout=1.0)\n   503\u2192        except asyncio.TimeoutError:\n   504\u2192            logger.warning(\"Tasks did not cancel within timeout\")\n   505\u2192        except Exception as e:\n   506\u2192            logger.debug(f\"Error cancelling tasks: {e}\")\n   507\u2192        \n   508\u2192        if client:\n   509\u2192            await client.close()\n   510\u2192        if websocket.client_state != WebSocketState.DISCONNECTED:\n   511\u2192            try:\n   512\u2192                await websocket.close()\n   513\u2192            except RuntimeError as e:\n   514\u2192                logger.warning(f\"Ignoring error during websocket close: {e}\")\n   515\u2192        logger.info(\"WebSocket connection closed for /api/v1/ws\")\n   516\u2192\n   517\u2192@app.post(\n   518\u2192    \"/api/v1/readability\",\n   519\u2192    response_model=ReadabilityResponse,\n   520\u2192    summary=\"Enhance Text Readability\",\n   521\u2192    description=\"Improve the readability of the provided text using GPT-4o.\"\n   522\u2192)\n   523\u2192async def enhance_readability(request: ReadabilityRequest):\n   524\u2192    prompt = PROMPTS.get('readability-enhance')\n   525\u2192    if not prompt:\n   526\u2192        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=\"Readability prompt not found.\")\n   527\u2192\n   528\u2192    try:\n   529\u2192        async def text_generator():\n   530\u2192            # Use gpt-4o specifically for readability\n   531\u2192            async for part in llm_processor.process_text(request.text, prompt, model=\"gpt-4o\"):\n   532\u2192                yield part\n   533\u2192\n   534\u2192        return StreamingResponse(text_generator(), media_type=\"text/plain\")\n   535\u2192\n   536\u2192    except Exception as e:\n   537\u2192        logger.error(f\"Error enhancing readability: {e}\", exc_info=True)\n   538\u2192        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=\"Error processing readability enhancement.\")\n   539\u2192\n   540\u2192# TEMPORARILY DISABLED - Ask AI API endpoint\n   541\u2192# @app.post(\n   542\u2192#     \"/api/v1/ask_ai\",\n   543\u2192#     response_model=AskAIResponse,\n   544\u2192#     summary=\"Ask AI a Question\",\n   545\u2192#     description=\"Ask AI to provide insights using O1-mini model.\"\n   546\u2192# )\n   547\u2192# def ask_ai(request: AskAIRequest):\n   548\u2192#     prompt = PROMPTS.get('ask-ai')\n   549\u2192#     if not prompt:\n   550\u2192#         raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=\"Ask AI prompt not found.\")\n   551\u2192\n   552\u2192#     try:\n   553\u2192#         # Use o3-mini specifically for ask_ai\n   554\u2192#         answer = llm_processor.process_text_sync(request.text, prompt, model=\"gpt-4.1\")\n   555\u2192#         return AskAIResponse(answer=answer)\n   556\u2192#     except Exception as e:\n   557\u2192#         logger.error(f\"Error processing AI question: {e}\", exc_info=True)\n   558\u2192#         raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=\"Error processing AI question.\")\n   559\u2192\n   560\u2192@app.post(\n   561\u2192    \"/api/v1/correctness\",\n   562\u2192    response_model=CorrectnessResponse,\n   563\u2192    summary=\"Check Factual Correctness\",\n   564\u2192    description=\"Analyze the text for factual accuracy using GPT-4o.\"\n   565\u2192)\n   566\u2192async def check_correctness(request: CorrectnessRequest):\n   567\u2192    prompt = PROMPTS.get('correctness-check')\n   568\u2192    if not prompt:\n   569\u2192        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=\"Correctness prompt not found.\")\n   570\u2192\n   571\u2192    try:\n   572\u2192        async def text_generator():\n   573\u2192            async for part in llm_processor.process_text(request.text, prompt, model=\"gpt-4o-search-preview\"):\n   574\u2192                yield part\n   575\u2192\n   576\u2192        return StreamingResponse(text_generator(), media_type=\"text/plain\")\n   577\u2192\n   578\u2192    except Exception as e:\n   579\u2192        logger.error(f\"Error checking correctness: {e}\", exc_info=True)\n   580\u2192        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=\"Error processing correctness check.\")\n   581\u2192\n   582\u2192if __name__ == '__main__':\n   583\u2192    uvicorn.run(app, host=\"0.0.0.0\", port=3005)\n   584\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #19
Now I have a complete understanding of the codebase. Let me plan all the changes needed: 1. **PWA Shell**: - Create `static/manifest.json` - Create `static/sw.js` (service worker for offline caching) - Create `static/icons/` directory with SVG icons (192x192 and 512x512) - Update `realtime.html`: add manifest link, SW registration, update title to "Hey Chill", update h1 to "Hey Chill" 2. **Wake Word Detection**: - Add "Hands-free mode" toggle to the settings modal - Implement continuous wake word detection in main.js using the Web Speech API, with fuzzy matching to catch variations like "hey chill", "hey chil", or "a chill" - Display a listening indicator and make sure it doesn't interfere with active recording 3. **Mobile Polish**: - Safe area insets are mostly handled, but I need to verify all interactive elements meet the 44x44px minimum touch target size - Add haptic feedback when the mic button is pressed and ensure the app works in standalone mode Now I'm setting up the manifest and icon files. The manifest.json will live at `/static/manifest.json` and be referenced from the HTML, with the start URL pointing to `/`. I'll create SVG icons and organize them in the static directory, then start implementing these changes on a new branch. For the hands-free wake word feature, I realize I can't run two separate SpeechRecognition instances simultaneously since browsers only support one microphone stream. Instead, I'll use a single instance that cycles between wake word detection mode and Quick mode—listening for "hey chill" continuously, then switching to Quick mode when detected, and cycling back once Quick mode finishes. I'll add a small indicator badge near the mic section to show when wake word listening is active, and make sure the header respects safe area insets for notched devices. For the PWA icons, I'll use SVG with the "any" size descriptor and maskable purpose in the manifest, plus a 192x192 PNG fallback... actually, keeping it simple with just the SVG pointing to multiple size entries works fine and is valid. Now I'm setting up all the files: the SVG icon, the manifest configuration, a service worker for caching, updating the HTML with the new branding and hands-free controls, and adding wake word detection to the main script. For the wake word matching, I need fuzzy matching since variations like "hey chill", "hey chil", and "a chill" should all work. I'm using a regex approach that normalizes the text to lowercase and checks for these patterns with some flexibility for common speech variations. Writing wake word detection logic... Now I'm setting up the service worker to cache the essential files—the HTML page, JavaScript, CSS, manifest, and icon—using a cache-first strategy for static assets and network-first for the main page to keep things fresh. For haptic feedback, I'm adding vibration triggers to the button click handlers so users get tactile confirmation when they interact with the mic buttons. I'm also accounting for mobile safe areas in the CSS by adjusting the header padding to respect notches and rounded corners on modern devices. Now I'm ready to write out all the files—the SVG icon, the PWA manifest, the service worker, and updating the HTML with the new branding and features. I'm concerned about running two SpeechRecognition instances at the same time, so I'll keep them separate and sequential instead—the wake word listener runs continuously until Quick mode activates, then pauses while the main recognition is active, and resumes afterward. I'll use a dedicated `wakeRecognition` instance with higher `maxAlternatives` to catch more variations of "Hey Chill," and load the `handsFreeEnabled` preference from localStorage on page load to automatically start wake word listening if it's enabled. I'm realizing the cleanest solution is to keep two separate SpeechRecognition instances that never run at the same time—when the wake word recognizer is listening, the main recognizer stays idle, and vice versa, which avoids any audio pipeline conflicts. Setting up the wake word recognizer... Setting up error handling and auto-restart logic for the wake word listener—if the microphone is denied, I'll stop listening and log it, but for other errors I'll automatically restart the recognition if hands-free mode is still active. When recognition ends naturally, I'm also implementing auto-restart with a slight delay to keep the listener running continuously unless the user is already in a recording or brainstorm session. Now I'm defining the function to start wake word listening, which checks that speech recognition is available and hands-free is enabled, then prevents duplicate starts if already listening or processing. I'll initialize the recognition if needed and handle any startup errors by reinitializing. Defining the stop function... Writing the settings integration... Adding event listeners and haptic feedback... Now I'm reviewing the touch target sizes across the interface—the icon buttons and replay button are both undersized at 40px and 26px respectively, so I need to bump those up to meet the 44px minimum accessibility standard. Adjusting button sizes and adding safe area considerations... Now I'm handling the safe area insets for the header to account for notches and home indicators on mobile devices. For the icons, I'll use SVG since modern browsers support them well in PWA manifests, though I need to also consider the apple-touch-icon requirement for iOS compatibility. Generating PNG icons... Actually, SVG is simpler for this task since it's just placeholder icons, so I'll create SVG files and reference them in the manifest. I'm planning to create an SVG icon, update the manifest to point to it, and add a service worker file. Now I need to modify the HTML, JavaScript, and CSS files to add wake word detection, haptic feedback, a wake dot indicator, and hands-free settings. Let me start writing the code for all these components. Writing SVG icon... Setting up service worker... Writing service worker fetch handlers... Now I'm thinking through the manifest configuration—I need to set the start URL to the root path and define the scope appropriately. For the icons, I'll keep it simple with just an SVG since we're not overcomplicating things. Then I need to add the service worker registration script to the HTML, which will handle any errors gracefully if registration fails. But there's a scope issue I need to resolve—the service worker file is in `/static/` but I want it to control requests at the root level. Since the server is already serving static files, I'll need to add the `Service-Worker-Allowed` header to expand the scope beyond the default directory restriction. The constraint is that I can't modify the server code except for adding static file mounts, so I need to work within those limitations. I'm realizing the task explicitly allows adding static file mounts for the service worker, so I can add a `/sw.js` route to serve it from the root and give it the proper scope to cache the main app. Let me go with serving it from `/static/sw.js` and registering it with the appropriate scope instead. I'm realizing the simplest approach is to add server routes that serve `sw.js` and `manifest.json` from the static directory at the root paths—this avoids the scope security issue entirely and keeps server changes minimal. Looking at the existing server patterns, I can follow the same structure to add these routes. Writing the manifest and service worker... I'm finishing out the manifest with the SVG and PNG icon entries, making sure the SVG works for both standard and maskable purposes since my centered design fits the safe zone requirements. Now I need to generate the actual PNG files—I'll write a Python script to create them using PIL if available, or fall back to basic PNG generation. PNG creator in Python: A valid PNG needs: 1. PNG signature: `\x89PNG\r\n\x1a\n` 2. IHDR chunk: width, height, bit depth, color type, etc. 3. IDAT chunk: compressed image data 4. IEND chunk Let me create a helper script, or I can try to use PIL. You know what, let me just create the SVG and use that as the sole icon. The task says "can be solid color squares with 'HC' text, or use an SVG icon." So SVG-only is fine. I'll generate the PNGs via a Python script if PIL is available, otherwise just reference the SVG. Actually, for simplicity, let me create a Python script to generate simple PNGs and run it. If it fails (PIL not available), I'll fall back to SVG-only. Let me check if PIL or Pillow is listed in the requirements to see what's available.

I'm realizing the simplest approach is to add server routes that serve `sw.js` and `manifest.json` from the static directory at the root paths\u2014this avoids the scope security issue entirely and keeps server changes minimal. Looking at the existing server patterns, I can follow the same structure to add these routes. Writing the manifest and service worker... I'm finishing out the manifest with the SVG and PNG icon entries, making sure the SVG works for both standard and maskable purposes since my centered design fits the safe zone requirements. Now I need to generate the actual PNG files\u2014I'll write a Python script to create them using PIL if available, or fall back to basic PNG generation. PNG creator in Python:\n\nA valid PNG needs:\n1. PNG signature: `\\x89PNG\\r\\n\\x1a\\n`\n2. IHDR chunk: width, height, bit depth, color type, etc.\n3. IDAT chunk: compressed image data\n4. IEND chunk\n\nLet me create a helper script, or I can try to use PIL.\n\nYou know what, let me just create the SVG and use that as the sole icon. The task says \"can be solid color squares with 'HC' text, or use an SVG icon.\" So SVG-only is fine.\n\nI'll generate the PNGs via a Python script if PIL is available, otherwise just reference the SVG.\n\nActually, for simplicity, let me create a Python script to generate simple PNGs and run it. If it fails (PIL not available), I'll fall back to SVG-only. Let me check if PIL or Pillow is listed in the requirements to see what's available.",

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #35
Bash TOOL CALL 
{
  "command": "python3 - <<'EOF'\nimport struct, zlib, os\n\ndef create_png(width, height, filename):\n    \"\"\"Create a minimal valid PNG with solid #1a1a2e background and simple design.\"\"\"\n    # Background color #1a1a2e = (26, 26, 46)\n    bg = (26, 26, 46)\n    accent = (83, 52, 131)  # #533483\n\n    # Create raw image data\n    rows = []\n    cx, cy = width // 2, height // 2\n    r_outer = int(width * 0.41)  # outer circle\n    r_inner = int(width * 0.33)  # inner circle\n\n    # Simple mic shape bounds\n    mic_w = int(width * 0.156)\n    mic_h = int(height * 0.273)\n    mic_x = cx - mic_w // 2\n    mic_y = cy - int(height * 0.23)\n\n    for y in range(height):\n        row = bytearray()\n        for x in range(width):\n            dx, dy = x - cx, y - cy\n            dist = (dx*dx + dy*dy) ** 0.5\n\n            if dist <= r_outer:\n                if dist <= r_inner:\n                    # Inner area - darker\n                    r_,g_,b_ = 15, 52, 96\n                else:\n                    # Outer ring - accent\n                    r_,g_,b_ = accent\n                # Draw simple mic rectangle\n                if (mic_x <= x < mic_x + mic_w and\n                    mic_y <= y < mic_y + mic_h):\n                    # Check for rounded corners (rough)\n                    r_,g_,b_ = 255, 255, 255\n            else:\n                r_,g_,b_ = bg\n            row += bytes([r_, g_, b_])\n        rows.append(bytes([0]) + row)  # filter byte\n\n    raw = b''.join(rows)\n    compressed = zlib.compress(raw, 9)\n\n    def chunk(name, data):\n        c = name + data\n        return struct.pack('>I', len(data)) + c + struct.pack('>I', zlib.crc32(c) & 0xffffffff)\n\n    signature = b'\\x89PNG\\r\\n\\x1a\\n'\n    ihdr_data = struct.pack('>IIBBBBB', width, height, 8, 2, 0, 0, 0)\n    png = (signature +\n           chunk(b'IHDR', ihdr_data) +\n           chunk(b'IDAT', compressed) +\n           chunk(b'IEND', b''))\n\n    os.makedirs('static/icons', exist_ok=True)\n    with open(filename, 'wb') as f:\n        f.write(png)\n    print(f\"Created {filename} ({os.path.getsize(filename)} bytes)\")\n\ncreate_png(192, 192, 'static/icons/icon-192.png')\ncreate_png(512, 512, 'static/icons/icon-512.png')\nEOF\n",
  "description": "Generate simple 192x192 and 512x512 PNG icons"
}
▶ VIEW RAW DATA 
{
  "content": {
    "type": "tool_use",
    "id": "toolu_012CS48BZxEadzAQnmTS9sYV",
    "name": "Bash",
    "input": {
      "command": "python3 - <<'EOF'\nimport struct, zlib, os\n\ndef create_png(width, height, filename):\n    \"\"\"Create a minimal valid PNG with solid #1a1a2e background and simple design.\"\"\"\n    # Background color #1a1a2e = (26, 26, 46)\n    bg = (26, 26, 46)\n    accent = (83, 52, 131)  # #533483\n\n    # Create raw image data\n    rows = []\n    cx, cy = width // 2, height // 2\n    r_outer = int(width * 0.41)  # outer circle\n    r_inner = int(width * 0.33)  # inner circle\n\n    # Simple mic shape bounds\n    mic_w = int(width * 0.156)\n    mic_h = int(height * 0.273)\n    mic_x = cx - mic_w // 2\n    mic_y = cy - int(height * 0.23)\n\n    for y in range(height):\n        row = bytearray()\n        for x in range(width):\n            dx, dy = x - cx, y - cy\n            dist = (dx*dx + dy*dy) ** 0.5\n\n            if dist <= r_outer:\n                if dist <= r_inner:\n                    # Inner area - darker\n                    r_,g_,b_ = 15, 52, 96\n                else:\n                    # Outer ring - accent\n                    r_,g_,b_ = accent\n                # Draw simple mic rectangle\n                if (mic_x <= x < mic_x + mic_w and\n                    mic_y <= y < mic_y + mic_h):\n                    # Check for rounded corners (rough)\n                    r_,g_,b_ = 255, 255, 255\n            else:\n                r_,g_,b_ = bg\n            row += bytes([r_, g_, b_])\n        rows.append(bytes([0]) + row)  # filter byte\n\n    raw = b''.join(rows)\n    compressed = zlib.compress(raw, 9)\n\n    def chunk(name, data):\n        c = name + data\n        return struct.pack('>I', len(data)) + c + struct.pack('>I', zlib.crc32(c) & 0xffffffff)\n\n    signature = b'\\x89PNG\\r\\n\\x1a\\n'\n    ihdr_data = struct.pack('>IIBBBBB', width, height, 8, 2, 0, 0, 0)\n    png = (signature +\n           chunk(b'IHDR', ihdr_data) +\n           chunk(b'IDAT', compressed) +\n           chunk(b'IEND', b''))\n\n    os.makedirs('static/icons', exist_ok=True)\n    with open(filename, 'wb') as f:\n        f.write(png)\n    print(f\"Created {filename} ({os.path.getsize(filename)} bytes)\")\n\ncreate_png(192, 192, 'static/icons/icon-192.png')\ncreate_png(512, 512, 'static/icons/icon-512.png')\nEOF\n",
      "description": "Generate simple 192x192 and 512x512 PNG icons"
    },
    "caller": {
      "type": "direct"
    }
  }
}

  "content": "{\n  \"name\": \"Hey Chill\",\n  \"short_name\": \"Hey Chill\",\n  \"description\": \"Voice capture and transcription \u2014 Quick mode and Brainstorm mode.\",\n  \"theme_color\": \"#1a1a2e\",\n  \"background_color\": \"#1a1a2e\",\n  \"display\": \"standalone\",\n  \"orientation\": \"portrait\",\n  \"start_url\": \"/\",\n  \"scope\": \"/\",\n  \"icons\": [\n    {\n      \"src\": \"/static/icons/icon-192.png\",\n      \"sizes\": \"192x192\",\n      \"type\": \"image/png\",\n      \"purpose\": \"any\"\n    },\n    {\n      \"src\": \"/static/icons/icon-512.png\",\n      \"sizes\": \"512x512\",\n      \"type\": \"image/png\",\n      \"purpose\": \"any maskable\"\n    },\n    {\n      \"src\": \"/static/icons/icon.svg\",\n      \"sizes\": \"any\",\n      \"type\": \"image/svg+xml\",\n      \"purpose\": \"any\"\n    }\n  ]\n}\n"

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #43
Write TOOL CALL 
{
  "file_path": "/home/gem/project/static/sw.js",
  "content": "'use strict';\n\nconst CACHE_NAME = 'hey-chill-v1';\n\nconst SHELL_ASSETS = [\n    '/',\n    '/static/main.js',\n    '/static/style.css',\n    '/manifest.json',\n    '/static/icons/icon.svg',\n    '/static/icons/icon-192.png',\n    '/static/icons/icon-512.png',\n];\n\n/* ===== Install \u2014 pre-cache shell ===== */\nself.addEventListener('install', (event) => {\n    event.waitUntil(\n        caches.open(CACHE_NAME).then((cache) => cache.addAll(SHELL_ASSETS))\n    );\n    self.skipWaiting();\n});\n\n/* ===== Activate \u2014 remove stale caches ===== */\nself.addEventListener('activate', (event) => {\n    event.waitUntil(\n        caches.keys().then((keys) =>\n            Promise.all(\n                keys.filter((k) => k !== CACHE_NAME).map((k) => caches.delete(k))\n            )\n        )\n    );\n    self.clients.claim();\n});\n\n/* ===== Fetch \u2014 network-first for HTML, cache-first for assets ===== */\nself.addEventListener('fetch', (event) => {\n    const { request } = event;\n\n    // Only handle GET requests\n    if (request.method !== 'GET') return;\n\n    const url = new URL(request.url);\n\n    // Skip non-same-origin, WebSocket upgrade, and API requests\n    if (url.origin !== self.location.origin) return;\n    if (url.pathname.startsWith('/api/')) return;\n\n    const isHTMLRequest = request.headers.get('accept')?.includes('text/html');\n\n    if (isHTMLRequest) {\n        // Network-first for the app shell HTML\n        event.respondWith(\n            fetch(request)\n                .then((response) => {\n                    if (response.ok) {\n                        const clone = response.clone();\n                        caches.open(CACHE_NAME).then((cache) => cache.put(request, clone));\n                    }\n                    return response;\n                })\n                .catch(() => caches.match('/'))\n        );\n        return;\n    }\n\n    // Cache-first for static assets\n    event.respondWith(\n        caches.match(request).then((cached) => {\n            if (cached) return cached;\n            return fetch(request).then((response) => {\n                if (response.ok) {\n                    const clone = response.clone();\n                    caches.open(CACHE_NAME).then((cache) => cache.put(request, clone));\n                }\n                return response;\n            });\n        })\n    );\n});\n"
}
▶ VIEW RAW DATA 
{
  "content": {
    "type": "tool_use",
    "id": "toolu_01W5sVgfawXCgEob1NDPjQmv",
    "name": "Write",
    "input": {
      "file_path": "/home/gem/project/static/sw.js",
      "content": "'use strict';\n\nconst CACHE_NAME = 'hey-chill-v1';\n\nconst SHELL_ASSETS = [\n    '/',\n    '/static/main.js',\n    '/static/style.css',\n    '/manifest.json',\n    '/static/icons/icon.svg',\n    '/static/icons/icon-192.png',\n    '/static/icons/icon-512.png',\n];\n\n/* ===== Install \u2014 pre-cache shell ===== */\nself.addEventListener('install', (event) => {\n    event.waitUntil(\n        caches.open(CACHE_NAME).then((cache) => cache.addAll(SHELL_ASSETS))\n    );\n    self.skipWaiting();\n});\n\n/* ===== Activate \u2014 remove stale caches ===== */\nself.addEventListener('activate', (event) => {\n    event.waitUntil(\n        caches.keys().then((keys) =>\n            Promise.all(\n                keys.filter((k) => k !== CACHE_NAME).map((k) => caches.delete(k))\n            )\n        )\n    );\n    self.clients.claim();\n});\n\n/* ===== Fetch \u2014 network-first for HTML, cache-first for assets ===== */\nself.addEventListener('fetch', (event) => {\n    const { request } = event;\n\n    // Only handle GET requests\n    if (request.method !== 'GET') return;\n\n    const url = new URL(request.url);\n\n    // Skip non-same-origin, WebSocket upgrade, and API requests\n    if (url.origin !== self.location.origin) return;\n    if (url.pathname.startsWith('/api/')) return;\n\n    const isHTMLRequest = request.headers.get('accept')?.includes('text/html');\n\n    if (isHTMLRequest) {\n        // Network-first for the app shell HTML\n        event.respondWith(\n            fetch(request)\n                .then((response) => {\n                    if (response.ok) {\n                        const clone = response.clone();\n                        caches.open(CACHE_NAME).then((cache) => cache.put(request, clone));\n                    }\n                    return response;\n                })\n                .catch(() => caches.match('/'))\n        );\n        return;\n    }\n\n    // Cache-first for static assets\n    event.respondWith(\n        caches.match(request).then((cached) => {\n            if (cached) return cached;\n            return fetch(request).then((response) => {\n                if (response.ok) {\n                    const clone = response.clone();\n                    caches.open(CACHE_NAME).then((cache) => cache.put(request, clone));\n                }\n                return response;\n            });\n        })\n    );\n});\n"
    },
    "caller": {
      "type": "direct"
    }
  }
}

name=\"theme-color\" content=\"#1a1a2e\"/>\n  <meta name=\"mobile-web-app-capable\" content=\"yes\"/>\n  <meta name=\"apple-mobile-web-app-capable\" content=\"yes\"/>\n  <meta name=\"apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style\" content=\"black-translucent\"/>\n  <meta name=\"apple-mobile-web-app-title\" content=\"Hey Chill\"/>\n  <title>Hey Chill</title>\n  <link rel=\"manifest\" href=\"/manifest.json\"/>\n  <link rel=\"apple-touch-icon\" href=\"/static/icons/icon-192.png\"/>\n  <link rel=\"stylesheet\" type=\"text/css\" href=\"static/style.css\"/>\n</head>\n<body>\n  <div id=\"app\">\n\n    <!-- Header -->\n    <header class=\"header\">\n      <div class=\"header-title\">\n        <span class=\"logo-dot\"></span>\n 0 0 0-1.51 1z\"/>\n          </svg>\n        </button>\n      </div>\n    </header>\n\n    <!-- Message history -->\n    <main class=\"messages\" id=\"messages\" aria-live=\"polite\" aria-label=\"Message history\">\n      <div class=\"messages-empty\" id=\"messages-empty\">\n        <p>Your messages will appear here</p>\n      </div>\n    </main>\n\n    <!-- Transcript bar (shown after recording stops, awaiting send/discard) -->\n    <div class=\"transcript-bar\" id=\"transcript-bar\" hidden>\n      <p class=\"transcript-text\" id=\"transcript-text\"></p>\n\n      <!-- Brainstorm post-processing (only visible when source === 'brainstorm') -->\n      <div class=\"postprocess-bar\" id=\"postprocess-bar\" hidden>\n        <div class=\"postprocess-actions\">\n          <button class=\"btn-process btn-readability\" id=\"readability-btn\">Readability</button>\n          <button class=\"btn-process btn-inspire\" id=\"inspire-btn\">Inspire</button>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"postprocess-result\" id=\"postprocess-result\" hidden>\n          <div class=\"postprocess-result-header\">\n            <span class=\"postprocess-label\" id=\"postprocess-label\"></span>\n          </div>\n          <p class=\"postprocess-text\" id=\"postprocess-text\"></p>\n          <div class=\"postprocess-result-actions\" id=\"postprocess-result-actions\" hidden>\n            <button class=\"btn-send\" id=\"postprocess-send-btn\">Send</button>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <div class=\"transcript-actions\">\n        <button class=\"btn-ghost\" id=\"discard-btn\">Discard</button>\n        <button class=\"btn-send\" id=\"send-btn\">Send</button>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Live transcript (shown while recording / processing) -->\n    <div class=\"live-transcript\" id=\"live-transcript\" hidden>\n      <p id=\"live-text\">Listening\u2026</p>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Mic section -->\n    <section class=\"mic-section\">\n      <div class=\"mic-hint\" id=\"mic-hint\"></div>\n\n      <div class=\"mic-buttons\">\n\n        <!-- Quick: Web Speech API, browser-native, no backend -->\n        <div class=\"mode-btn-wrap\">\n          <div class=\"mic-ring\" id=\"quick-ring\">\n            <button class=\"mic-btn\" id=\"quick-btn\"\n                    aria-label=\"Quick \u2013 tap to speak\" aria-pressed=\"false\">\n              <svg class=\"mic-icon\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                <path d=\"M12 1a4 4 0 0 1 4 4v7a4 4 0 0 1-8 0V5a4 4 0 0 1 4-4z\"/>\n                <path d=\"M19 11a1 1 0 0 1 1 1 8 8 0 0 1-16 0 1 1 0 1 1 2 0 6 6 0 0 0 12 0 1 1 0 0 1 1-1z\"/>\n                <line x1=\"12\" y1=\"19\" x2=\"12\" y2=\"23\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"/>\n                <line x1=\"8\" y1=\"23\" x2=\"16\" y2=\"23\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"/>\n              </svg>\n            </button>\n          </div>\n          <span class=\"mode-label\">Quick</span>\n        </div>\n\n        <!-- Brainstorm: WebSocket Realtime API -->\n        <div class=\"mode-btn-wrap\">\n          <div class=\"mic-ring brainstorm-ring\" id=\"brainstorm-ring\">\n            <button class=\"mic-btn brainstorm-btn\" id=\"brainstorm-btn\"\n                    aria-label=\"Brainstorm \u2013 tap to record\" aria-pressed=\"false\">\n              <svg class=\"mic-icon\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                <rect x=\"2\"  y=\"8\"  width=\"3\" height=\"8\"  rx=\"1.5\"/>\n                <rect x=\"7\"  y=\"4\"  width=\"3\" height=\"16\" rx=\"1.5\"/>\n                <rect x=\"12\" y=\"6\"  width=\"3\" height=\"12\" rx=\"1.5\"/>\n                <rect x=\"17\" y=\"2\"  width=\"3\" height=\"20\" rx=\"1.5\"/>\n              </svg>\n            </button>\n          </div>\n          <span class=\"mode-label brainstorm-label\">Brainstorm</span>\n          <div class=\"brainstorm-meta\">\n            <span id=\"timer\" class=\"timer-text\" hidden>00:00</span>\n            <button id=\"replayButton\" class=\"replay-btn\" disabled title=\"Replay last recording\">\n              <svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\">\n                <path d=\"M3 12a9 9 0 0 1 9-9 9.75 9.75 0 0 1 6.74 2.74L21 8\"/>\n                <path d=\"M21 3v5h-5\"/>\n                <path d=\"M21 12a9 9 0 0 1-9 9 9.75 9.75 0 0 1-6.74-2.74L3 16\"/>\n                <path d=\"M3 21v-5h5\"/>\n              </svg>\n            </button>\n            <span id=\"connectionStatus\" class=\"ws-dot\" title=\"WebSocket status\"></span>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n      </div>\n    </section>\n\n    <!-- Not supported: Quick mode only -->\n    <div class=\"not-supported\" id=\"not-supported\" hidden>\n      <p>Speech recognition is not supported in this browser. Quick mode unavailable; Brainstorm mode still works.</p>\n    </div>\n\n  </div><!-- #app -->\n\n  <!-- Settings Modal -->\n  <div class=\"modal-overlay\" id=\"modal-overlay\" hidden>\n    <div class=\"modal\" role=\"dialog\" aria-modal=\"true\" aria-labelledby=\"modal-title\">\n      <div class=\"modal-header\">\n        <h2 id=\"modal-title\">Settings</h2>\n        <button class=\"icon-btn\" id=\"modal-close\" aria-label=\"Close settings\">\n          <svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\">\n            <line x1=\"18\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"6\" y2=\"18\"/>\n            <line x1=\"6\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"18\" y2=\"18\"/>\n          </svg>\n        </button>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"modal-body\">\n        <label for=\"lang-select\">Language (Quick mode)</label>\n        <select id=\"lang-select\">\n          <option value=\"\">Auto-detect</option>\n          <option value=\"en-US\">English (US)</option>\n          <option value=\"zh-HK\">Cantonese (\u5ee3\u6771\u8a71)</option>\n        </select>\n        <p class=\"field-hint\">Language used for Quick mode speech recognition.</p>\n\n        <label class=\"toggle-label\" for=\"hands-free-toggle\">\n          <span>Hands-free mode</span>\n          <span class=\"toggle-switch\">\n            <input type=\"checkbox\" id=\"hands-free-toggle\" role=\"switch\"/>\n            <span class=\"toggle-track\"></span>\n          </span>\n        </label>\n        <p class=\"field-hint\">Always listen for \"Hey Chill\" to start Quick mode automatically.</p>\n\n        <label for=\"webhook-url\">Webhook URL</label>\n        <input type=\"url\" id=\"webhook-url\"\n               placeholder=\"https://your-webhook.example.com/hook\"\n               autocomplete=\"off\" spellcheck=\"false\"/>\n        <p class=\"field-hint\">Messages are POSTed here as <code>{ text, source, timestamp }</code>.</p>\n\n        <label for=\"backend-url\">Backend URL</label>\n        <input type=\"url\" id=\"backend-url\"\n               placeholder=\"https://your-brainwave-backend.example.com\"\n               autocomplete=\"off\" spellcheck=\"false\"/>\n        <p class=\"field-hint\">Brainstorm connects to this host's WebSocket (<code>/api/v1/ws</code>). Leave blank to use the same host.</p>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"modal-footer\">\n        <button class=\"btn-send\" id=\"save-settings\">Save</button>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <script>\n    if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {\n      navigator.serviceWorker.register('/sw.js', { scope: '/' })\n        .catch(function(err) { console.warn('SW registration failed:', err); });\n    }\n  </script>\n  <script src=\"static/main.js\"></script>\n</body>\n</html>\n"
}

class=\"modal\" role=\"dialog\" aria-modal=\"true\" aria-labelledby=\"modal-title\">\n      <div class=\"modal-header\">\n        <h2 id=\"modal-title\">Settings</h2>\n        <button class=\"icon-btn\" id=\"modal-close\" aria-label=\"Close settings\">\n          <svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\">\n            <line x1=\"18\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"6\" y2=\"18\"/>\n            <line x1=\"6\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"18\" y2=\"18\"/>\n          </svg>\n        </button>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"modal-body\">\n        <label for=\"lang-select\">Language (Quick mode)</label>\n        <select id=\"lang-select\">\n          <option value=\"\">Auto-detect</option>\n          <option value=\"en-US\">English (US)</option>\n          <option value=\"zh-HK\">Cantonese (\u5ee3\u6771\u8a71)</option>\n        </select>\n        <p class=\"field-hint\">Language used for Quick mode speech recognition.</p>\n\n        <label class=\"toggle-label\" for=\"hands-free-toggle\">\n          <span>Hands-free mode</span>\n          <span class=\"toggle-switch\">\n            <input type=\"checkbox\" id=\"hands-free-toggle\" role=\"switch\"/>\n            <span class=\"toggle-track\"></span>\n          </span>\n        </label>\n        <p class=\"field-hint\">Always listen for \"Hey Chill\" to start Quick mode automatically.</p>\n\n        <label for=\"webhook-url\">Webhook URL</label>\n        <input type=\"url\" id=\"webhook-url\"\n               placeholder=\"https://your-webhook.example.com/hook\"\n               autocomplete=\"off\" spellcheck=\"false\"/>\n        <p class=\"field-hint\">Messages are POSTed here as <code>{ text, source, timestamp }</code>.</p>\n\n        <label for=\"backend-url\">Backend URL</label>\n        <input type=\"url\" id=\"backend-url\"\n               placeholder=\"https://your-brainwave-backend.example.com\"\n               autocomplete=\"off\" spellcheck=\"false\"/>\n        <p class=\"field-hint\">Brainstorm connects to this host's WebSocket (<code>/api/v1/ws</code>). Leave blank to use the same host.</p>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"modal-footer\">\n        <button class=\"btn-send\" id=\"save-settings\">Save</button>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <script>\n    if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {\n      navigator.serviceWorker.register('/sw.js', { scope: '/' })\n        .catch(function(err) { console.warn('SW registration failed:', err); });\n    }\n  </script>\n  <script src=\"static/main.js\"></script>\n</body>\n</html>\n"
    },
    "caller": {
      "type": "direct"
    }
  }
}

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #53
Write TOOL CALL 
{
  "file_path": "/home/gem/project/static/main.js",
  "content": "'use strict';\n\n/* ===== QUICK MODE STATE (Web Speech API) ===== */\nlet recognition       = null;\nlet isListening       = false;\nlet quickFinalTranscript = '';\nlet silenceTimer      = null;\nconst SILENCE_DELAY   = 3500; // ms \u2014 auto-stop after this much silence\n\n/* ===== BRAINSTORM MODE STATE (WebSocket + PCM audio) ===== */\nlet ws, audioContext, processor, source, stream;\nlet isBrainstormRecording  = false;\nlet isBrainstormProcessing = false; // after stop_recording, waiting for WS idle\nlet isStopping             = false; // allow final audio flush during stop\nlet isReplaying            = false;\nlet timerInterval, startTime;\nlet audioBuffer            = new Int16Array(0);\nlet wsConnected            = false;\nlet streamInitialized      = false;\nlet brainstormTranscript   = '';\nlet _awaitingBrainstormResult = false;\n\n/* ===== WAKE WORD / HANDS-FREE STATE ===== */\nlet wakeRecognition   = null;\nlet wakeWordListening = false;\nlet handsFreeEnabled  = false;\n\n/* ===== URL PARAMS ===== */\nconst urlParams   = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\nconst autoStart   = urlParams.get('start') === '1';\nlet   isAutoStarted = false;\n\n/* ===== INDEXEDDB STATE ===== */\nlet db              = null;\nlet currentSessionId = null;\nlet sessionStartTime = null;\nlet chunkSeq        = 0;\nlet storageAvailable = false;\n\n/* ===== DOM REFS ===== */\nconst quickBtn         = document.getElementById('quick-btn');\nconst quickRing        = document.getElementById('quick-ring');\nconst brainstormBtn    = document.getElementById('brainstorm-btn');\nconst brainstormRing   = document.getElementById('brainstorm-ring');\nconst micHint          = document.getElementById('mic-hint');\nconst liveTranscript   = document.getElementById('live-transcript');\nconst liveText         = document.getElementById('live-text');\nconst transcriptBar    = document.getElementById('transcript-bar');\nconst transcriptText   = document.getElementById('transcript-text');\nconst sendBtn          = document.getElementById('send-btn');\nconst discardBtn       = document.getElementById('discard-btn');\nconst messagesEl       = document.getElementById('messages');\nconst messagesEmpty    = document.getElementById('messages-empty');\nconst timerEl          = document.getElementById('timer');\nconst replayButton     = document.getElementById('replayButton');\nconst connectionStatus = document.getElementById('connectionStatus');\nconst notSupported     = document.getElementById('not-supported');\nconst settingsBtn      = document.getElementById('settings-btn');\nconst modalOverlay     = document.getElementById('modal-overlay');\nconst modalClose       = document.getElementById('modal-close');\nconst webhookInput     = document.getElementById('webhook-url');\nconst backendUrlInput  = document.getElementById('backend-url');\nconst langSelect       = document.getElementById('lang-select');\nconst saveSettings     = document.getElementById('save-settings');\nconst modelSelect      = document.getElementById('modelSelect');\nconst handsFreeToggle  = document.getElementById('hands-free-toggle');\nconst wakeDot          = document.getElementById('wake-dot');\n\n/* ===== POST-PROCESSING DOM REFS ===== */\nconst postprocessBar           = document.getElementById('postprocess-bar');\nconst readabilityBtn           = document.getElementById('readability-btn');\nconst inspireBtn               = document.getElementById('inspire-btn');\nconst postprocessResult        = document.getElementById('postprocess-result');\nconst postprocessLabel         = document.getElementById('postprocess-label');\nconst postprocessText          = document.getElementById('postprocess-text');\nconst postprocessResultActions = document.getElementById('postprocess-result-actions');\nconst postprocessSendBtn       = document.getElementById('postprocess-send-btn');\n\n/* ===== UTILITY ===== */\nfunction escapeHtml(str) {\n    return str\n        .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')\n        .replace(/</g, '&lt;')\n        .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')\n        .replace(/\"/g, '&quot;')\n        .replace(/'/g, '&#39;');\n}\n\nfunction haptic(ms) {\n    if (navigator.vibrate) navigator.vibrate(ms);\n}\n\n/* ===== TIMER ===== */\nfunction startTimer() {\n    clearInterval(timerInterval);\n    startTime = Date.now();\n    timerEl.hidden = false;\n    timerEl.textContent = '00:00';\n    timerInterval = setInterval(() => {\n        const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;\n        const mins = Math.floor(elapsed / 60000);\n        const secs = Math.floor((elapsed % 60000) / 1000);\n        timerEl.textContent = `${String(mins).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(secs).padStart(2, '0')}`;\n    }, 1000);\n}\n\nfunction stopTimer() {\n    clearInterval(timerInterval);\n    timerEl.hidden = true;\n}\n\n/* ===== LIVE TRANSCRIPT AREA ===== */\nfunction showLiveTranscript(text, mode) {\n    liveTranscript.hidden = false;\n    liveTranscript.classList.toggle('brainstorm-mode', mode === 'brainstorm');\n    if (text) {\n        liveText.textContent = text;\n        liveText.classList.add('has-text');\n    } else {\n        liveText.textContent = mode === 'quick' ? 'Listening\u2026' : 'Recording\u2026';\n        liveText.classList.remove('has-text');\n    }\n}\n\nfunction updateLiveText(text) {\n    if (text) {\n        liveText.textContent = text;\n        liveText.classList.add('has-text');\n        if (isBrainstormProcessing) {\n            liveTranscript.scrollTop = liveTranscript.scrollHeight;\n        }\n    } else {\n        liveText.textContent = isListening ? 'Listening\u2026' : 'Recording\u2026';\n        liveText.classList.remove('has-text');\n    }\n}\n\nfunction hideLiveTranscript() {\n    liveTranscript.hidden = true;\n    liveText.textContent = 'Listening\u2026';\n    liveText.classList.remove('has-text');\n}\n\n/* ===== TRANSCRIPT BAR ===== */\nfunction showTranscriptBar(text, source) {\n    transcriptText.textContent = text;\n    transcriptBar.dataset.source = source || 'quick';\n    transcriptBar.hidden = false;\n\n    // Show / reset post-processing for Brainstorm mode\n    const isBrainstorm = source === 'brainstorm';\n    postprocessBar.hidden = !isBrainstorm;\n    postprocessResult.hidden = true;\n    postprocessResultActions.hidden = true;\n    postprocessText.textContent = '';\n    readabilityBtn.textContent = 'Readability';\n    inspireBtn.textContent = 'Inspire';\n    readabilityBtn.disabled = false;\n    inspireBtn.disabled = false;\n}\n\nfunction hideTranscriptBar() {\n    transcriptBar.hidden = true;\n    transcriptText.textContent = '';\n    // Reset post-processing state\n    postprocessBar.hidden = true;\n    postprocessResult.hidden = true;\n    postprocessResultActions.hidden = true;\n    postprocessText.textContent = '';\n}\n\n/* ===== MESSAGE HISTORY ===== */\nfunction addMessage(text, timestamp, status) {\n    messagesEmpty.style.display = 'none';\n    const el = document.createElement('div');\n    el.className = `message ${status}`;\n    const timeStr = new Date(timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });\n    const statusLabel = { sending: 'Sending\u2026', sent: 'Sent', error: 'Failed', 'no-webhook': 'No webhook' };\n    el.innerHTML = `\n        <p class=\"message-text\">${escapeHtml(text)}</p>\n        <div class=\"message-meta\">\n            <span class=\"message-time\">${timeStr}</span>\n            <span class=\"message-status\">${statusLabel[status] || status}</span>\n        </div>\n    `;\n    messagesEl.appendChild(el);\n    el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'end' });\n    return el;\n}\n\nfunction updateMessageStatus(el, status) {\n    el.className = `message ${status}`;\n    const statusEl = el.querySelector('.message-status');\n    const labels = { sent: 'Sent', error: 'Failed', 'no-webhook': 'No webhook set' };\n    if (statusEl) statusEl.textContent = labels[status] || status;\n}\n\n/* ===== WEBHOOK SEND ===== */\nasync function sendMessage(text, source) {\n    const webhookUrl = localStorage.getItem('webhookUrl') || '';\n    const timestamp  = new Date().toISOString();\n    const payload    = { text, source, timestamp };\n    const msgEl      = addMessage(text, timestamp, 'sending');\n\n    if (!webhookUrl) {\n        updateMessageStatus(msgEl, 'no-webhook');\n        return;\n    }\n\n    try {\n        const res = await fetch(webhookUrl, {\n            method:  'POST',\n            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n            body:    JSON.stringify(payload),\n        });\n        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);\n        updateMessageStatus(msgEl, 'sent');\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.warn('Webhook error:', err);\n        updateMessageStatus(msgEl, 'error');\n    }\n}\n\n/* ===== TRANSCRIPT BAR ACTIONS ===== */\nsendBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {\n    const text   = transcriptText.textContent.trim();\n    const source = transcriptBar.dataset.source || 'quick';\n    if (!text) return;\n    hideTranscriptBar();\n    await sendMessage(text, source);\n});\n\ndiscardBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n    hideTranscriptBar();\n});\n\n/* ===== BRAINSTORM POST-PROCESSING ===== */\n\nfunction getBackendBaseUrl() {\n    const backendUrl = localStorage.getItem('brainwaveBackendUrl') || '';\n    if (backendUrl) {\n        try {\n            const url = new URL(backendUrl);\n            return `${url.protocol}//${url.host}`;\n        } catch (_) { /* fall through to default */ }\n    }\n    return `${window.location.protocol}//${window.location.host}`;\n}\n\nlet _postprocessedContent = '';\n\nasync function runPostProcess(endpoint, label, activeBtn) {\n    const text = transcriptText.textContent.trim();\n    if (!text) return;\n\n    // Reset result area\n    _postprocessedContent = '';\n    postprocessText.textContent = '';\n    postprocessLabel.textContent = label;\n    postprocessResultActions.hidden = true;\n\n    // Disable both buttons; show loading on the active one\n    readabilityBtn.disabled = true;\n    inspireBtn.disabled = true;\n    const origLabel = activeBtn.textContent;\n    activeBtn.textContent = 'Processing\u2026';\n\n    // Show the result area (empty initially so user sees it appeared)\n    postprocessResult.hidden = false;\n\n    try {\n        const response = await fetch(`${getBackendBaseUrl()}${endpoint}`, {\n            method:  'POST',\n            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n            body:    JSON.stringify({ text }),\n        });\n\n        if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);\n\n        const reader  = response.body.getReader();\n        const decoder = new TextDecoder();\n\n        while (true) {\n            const { done, value } = await reader.read();\n            if (done) break;\n            _postprocessedContent += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });\n            postprocessText.textContent = _postprocessedContent;\n        }\n\n        // Streaming complete \u2014 show Send button\n        postprocessResultActions.hidden = false;\n\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error('Post-processing error:', err);\n        postprocessText.textContent = 'Error: could not process. Check connection and try again.';\n    } finally {\n        activeBtn.textContent = origLabel;\n        readabilityBtn.disabled = false;\n        inspireBtn.disabled = false;\n    }\n}\n\nreadabilityBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n    runPostProcess('/api/v1/readability', 'Readability', readabilityBtn);\n});\n\ninspireBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n    runPostProcess('/api/v1/correctness', 'Inspire', inspireBtn);\n});\n\npostprocessSendBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {\n    const text = _postprocessedContent.trim();\n    if (!text) return;\n    hideTranscriptBar();\n    await sendMessage(text, 'brainstorm');\n});\n\n/* ===== SETTINGS MODAL ===== */\nsettingsBtn.addEventListener('click', openSettings);\nmodalClose.addEventListener('click', closeSettings);\nmodalOverlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === modalOverlay) closeSettings(); });\ndocument.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { if (e.key === 'Escape') closeSettings(); });\n\nsaveSettings.addEventListener('click', () => {\n    const url = webhookInput.value.trim();\n    localStorage.setItem('webhookUrl', url);\n\n    const backendUrl = backendUrlInput.value.trim();\n    if (backendUrl) {\n        localStorage.setItem('brainwaveBackendUrl', backendUrl);\n    } else {\n        localStorage.removeItem('brainwaveBackendUrl');\n    }\n\n    const lang     = langSelect.value;\n    const prevLang = localStorage.getItem('recognitionLang') || '';\n    if (lang !== prevLang) {\n        if (lang) {\n            localStorage.setItem('recognitionLang', lang);\n        } else {\n            localStorage.removeItem('recognitionLang');\n        }\n        // Re-init recognition so new language takes effect immediately\n        if (!isListening) initRecognition();\n        // Re-init wake recognition for new language too\n        if (!wakeWordListening) initWakeRecognition();\n    }\n\n    const newHandsFree = handsFreeToggle ?
