      "new_string": "/* ===== Safe area for notch phones ===== */\n@supports (padding: env(safe-area-inset-bottom)) {\n  .header {\n    padding-top: calc(16px + env(safe-area-inset-top));\n    padding-left: calc(20px + env(safe-area-inset-left));\n    padding-right: calc(20px + env(safe-area-inset-right));\n  }\n\n  .mic-section {\n    padding-bottom: calc(36px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom));\n  }\n}\n\n/* ===== Wake word indicator ===== */\n.wake-dot {\n  width: 8px;\n  height: 8px;\n  border-radius: 50%;\n  background: #34c759;\n  box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(52, 199, 89, 0.55);\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n  animation: wake-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n\n@keyframes wake-pulse {\n  0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }\n  50%       { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(0.8); }\n}\n\n/* ===== Hands-free toggle in settings ===== */\n.toggle-label {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  font-size: 0.85rem;\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n  font-weight: 500;\n  margin-top: 4px;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  user-select: none;\n}\n\n.toggle-switch {\n  position: relative;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.toggle-switch input[type=\"checkbox\"] {\n  /* visually hidden but accessible */\n  position: absolute;\n  opacity: 0;\n  width: 0;\n  height: 0;\n}\n\n.toggle-track {\n  display: block;\n  width: 44px;\n  height: 26px;\n  background: var(--surface);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 13px;\n  position: relative;\n  transition: background var(--transition), border-color var(--transition);\n  cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.toggle-track::after {\n  content: '';\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 3px;\n  left: 3px;\n  width: 18px;\n  height: 18px;\n  border-radius: 50%;\n  background: var(--text-muted);\n  transition: transform var(--transition), background var(--transition);\n}\n\n.toggle-switch input:checked + .toggle-track {\n  background: rgba(52, 199, 89, 0.25);\n  border-color: #34c759;\n}\n\n.toggle-switch input:checked + .toggle-track::after {\n  transform: translateX(18px);\n  background: #34c759;\n}\n\n.toggle-switch input:focus-visible + .toggle-track {\n  outline: 2px solid var(--accent);\n  outline-offset: 2px;\n}\n\n/* ===== Touch target minimums (\u2265 44px) ===== */\n.icon-btn {\n  min-width: 44px;\n  min-height: 44px;\n}\n\n.btn-ghost,\n.btn-send {\n  min-height: 44px;\n}\n\n.btn-process {\n  min-height: 44px;\n}\n\n/* Replay button: small visual, large touch target via padding */\n.replay-btn {\n  padding: 9px;\n  width: 44px;\n  height: 44px;\n}"
    },

      "type": "direct"
    }
  }
}

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #60
Now I need to fix the `icon-btn` size since I increased it from 40px to 44px but the existing rule sets fixed width/height. Let me check and update:
▶ VIEW RAW DATA 
{

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #68
The replay-btn has a fixed 26x26px size. I need to update it to be at least 44x44px touch target. Rather than changing the visual appearance, I should change the width/height to 44px. The SVG inside is 13px, so the button will look a bit larger, but still compact. Actually, I'm already overriding it at the bottom of the CSS with: ```css .replay-btn { padding: 9px; width: 44px; height: 44px; } ``` This will override the 26x26 size since it comes later in the CSS. So the icon stays at 13px while the clickable button expands to 44x44px, which gives plenty of padding around it.

   800→  background: var(--surface);
   801→  border: 1px solid var(--border);

   805→  cursor: pointer;
   806→}
   807→
   808→.toggle-track::after {
   809→  content: '';
   810→  position: absolute;
   811→  top: 3px;
   812→  left: 3px;
   813→  width: 18px;
   814→  height: 18px;
   815→  border-radius: 50%;
   816→  background: var(--text-muted);
   817→  transition: transform var(--transition), background var(--transition);
   818→}
   819→
   820→.toggle-switch input:checked + .toggle-track {
   821→  background: rgba(52, 199, 89, 0.25);
   822→  border-color: #34c759;
   823→}
   824→
   825→.toggle-switch input:checked + .toggle-track::after {
   826→  transform: translateX(18px);
   827→  background: #34c759;
   828→}
   829→
   830→.toggle-switch input:focus-visible + .toggle-track {
   831→  outline: 2px solid var(--accent);
   832→  outline-offset: 2px;
   833→}
   834→
   835→/* ===== Touch target minimums (≥ 44px) ===== */
   836→.icon-btn {
   837→  min-width: 44px;
   838→  min-height: 44px;
   839→}
   840→
   841→.btn-ghost,
   842→.btn-send {
   843→  min-height: 44px;
   844→}
   845→
   846→.btn-process {
   847→  min-height: 44px;
   848→}
   849→
   850→/* Replay button: small visual, large touch target via padding */
   851→.replay-btn {
   852→  padding: 9px;
   853→  width: 44px;
   854→  height: 44px;
   855→}
   856→
   857→/* ===== Brainstorm Post-Processing ===== */
   858→.postprocess-bar {
   859→  margin-top: 12px;
   860→  padding-top: 12px;
   861→  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
   862→}
   863→
   864→.postprocess-actions {
   865→  display: flex;
   866→  gap: 8px;
   867→}
   868→
   869→.btn-process {
   870→  flex: 1;
   871→  border: 1px solid transparent;
   872→  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
   873→  padding: 8px 14px;
   874→  font-size: 0.85rem;

   876→  font-family: inherit;
   877→  cursor: pointer;

var(--radius-sm);\n   873\u2192  padding: 8px 14px;\n   874\u2192  font-size: 0.85rem;\n   875\u2192  font-weight: 600;\n   876\u2192  font-family: inherit;\n   877\u2192  cursor: pointer;\n 180, 216, 0.22);\n   890\u2192  border-color: rgba(0, 180, 216, 0.5);\n   891\u2192}\n   892\u2192\n   893\u2192.btn-inspire {\n   894\u2192  background: rgba(163, 121, 221, 0.12);\n   895\u2192 read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. ASSISTANTMESSAGE #77
I see that there's a duplicate `.replay-btn` override at the bottom (lines 851-855) that adds `padding: 9px; width: 44px; height: 44px;`. I already updated the main `.replay-btn` rule to have `width: 44px; height: 44px;`, so the `padding: 9px` is the only new thing. Let me clean this up. Also there's a duplicate `.icon-btn` override at lines 836-839 that says `min-width: 44px; min-height: 44px;`. I already changed the main `.icon-btn` rule to use `width: 44px; height: 44px;`, so the min-* overrides are redundant. I'll remove these redundant overrides from the "Touch target minimums" section and consolidate the replay-btn styling.

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #84
Edit TOOL CALL 
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/home/gem/project/realtime_server.py",
  "old_string": "@app.get(\"/static/main.js\")\nasync def get_main_js():\n    logger.info(\"Serving main.js via custom route\")\n    headers = {\"Cache-Control\": \"no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0\"}\n    return FileResponse(\"static/main.js\", media_type=\"application/javascript\", headers=headers)\n\napp.mount(\"/static\", StaticFiles(directory=\"static\"), name=\"static\")",
  "new_string": "@app.get(\"/static/main.js\")\nasync def get_main_js():\n    logger.info(\"Serving main.js via custom route\")\n    headers = {\"Cache-Control\": \"no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0\"}\n    return FileResponse(\"static/main.js\", media_type=\"application/javascript\", headers=headers)\n\n@app.get(\"/sw.js\")\nasync def get_sw():\n    \"\"\"Serve service worker from root path so its scope covers the full origin.\"\"\"\n    headers = {\"Cache-Control\": \"no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0\"}\n    return FileResponse(\"static/sw.js\", media_type=\"application/javascript\", headers=headers)\n\n@app.get(\"/manifest.json\")\nasync def get_manifest():\n    \"\"\"Serve PWA manifest from root path.\"\"\"\n    headers = {\"Cache-Control\": \"public, max-age=86400\"}\n    return FileResponse(\"static/manifest.json\", media_type=\"application/manifest+json\", headers=headers)\n\napp.mount(\"/static\", StaticFiles(directory=\"static\"), name=\"static\")"
}

  "content": {
    "type": "tool_use",
    "id": "toolu_0125aQtgkJNv7YdcjH4D8JaB",

    "input": {
      "replace_all": false,
      "file_path": "/home/gem/project/realtime_server.py",
      "old_string": "@app.get(\"/static/main.js\")\nasync def get_main_js():\n    logger.info(\"Serving main.js via custom route\")\n    headers = {\"Cache-Control\": \"no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0\"}\n    return FileResponse(\"static/main.js\", media_type=\"application/javascript\", headers=headers)\n\napp.mount(\"/static\", StaticFiles(directory=\"static\"), name=\"static\")",
      "new_string": "@app.get(\"/static/main.js\")\nasync def get_main_js():\n    logger.info(\"Serving main.js via custom route\")\n    headers = {\"Cache-Control\": \"no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0\"}\n    return FileResponse(\"static/main.js\", media_type=\"application/javascript\", headers=headers)\n\n@app.get(\"/sw.js\")\nasync def get_sw():\n    \"\"\"Serve service worker from root path so its scope covers the full origin.\"\"\"\n    headers = {\"Cache-Control\": \"no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0\"}\n    return FileResponse(\"static/sw.js\", media_type=\"application/javascript\", headers=headers)\n\n@app.get(\"/manifest.json\")\nasync def get_manifest():\n    \"\"\"Serve PWA manifest from root path.\"\"\"\n    headers = {\"Cache-Control\": \"public, max-age=86400\"}\n    return FileResponse(\"static/manifest.json\", media_type=\"application/manifest+json\", headers=headers)\n\napp.mount(\"/static\", StaticFiles(directory=\"static\"), name=\"static\")"
    },
    "caller": {
      "type": "direct"

}

Bash TOOL CALL 
{
  "command": "git commit -m \"$(cat <<'EOF'\nfeat: PWA support, wake word detection, and mobile polish\n\n- Add PWA manifest, service worker (offline shell caching), and icons\n- Rename app title/header from \"Brainwave\" to \"Hey Chill\"\n- Serve /sw.js and /manifest.json from root so SW scope covers full origin\n- Add always-on wake word detection (\"Hey Chill\" fuzzy match) via a\n  dedicated SpeechRecognition instance that never conflicts with active\n  Quick or Brainstorm recording\n- Add hands-free toggle in Settings that persists to localStorage\n- Show a green wake-dot indicator in the header when wake-listener is active\n- Add haptic feedback (50 ms vibration) on Quick and Brainstorm mic taps\n- Expand safe-area insets to cover header top and both sides (notch phones)\n- Increase all interactive touch targets to \u2265 44 \u00d7 44 px\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>\nEOF\n)\"\n",
  "description": "Commit all PWA, wake word, and mobile polish changes"
}

      "description": "Commit all PWA, wake word, and mobile polish changes"
    },
    "caller": {
      "type": "direct"
    }
  }
}

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #99
Bash TOOL CALL 
{
  "command": "gh pr create --title \"feat: PWA support, wake word detection, and mobile polish\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Summary\n\n- **PWA shell**: `manifest.json` (name: \"Hey Chill\", standalone display), `sw.js` service worker for offline shell caching, and placeholder icons (192\u00d7192 PNG, 512\u00d7512 PNG, scalable SVG). New `/sw.js` and `/manifest.json` routes in `realtime_server.py` so the SW scope covers the full origin.\n- **Rename**: title and `<h1>` changed from \"Brainwave\" \u2192 \"Hey Chill\".\n- **Wake word detection**: dedicated always-on `SpeechRecognition` instance listens for \"Hey Chill\" (fuzzy regex: `hey|hay|a` + `chil{1,2}`). Automatically starts Quick mode on match. Never runs concurrently with Quick or Brainstorm recording. Paused during active sessions and restarted when they end. Green pulsing dot indicator in header shows when listening.\n- **Hands-free toggle**: new toggle in Settings modal; persisted to `localStorage`.\n- **Haptic feedback**: `navigator.vibrate(50)` on Quick and Brainstorm mic button taps.\n- **Safe area**: header now accounts for `env(safe-area-inset-top/left/right)`; mic section bottom already covered.\n- **Touch targets**: `icon-btn` enlarged to 44\u00d744 px, `replay-btn` to 44\u00d744 px, `btn-ghost`/`btn-send`/`btn-process` get `min-height: 44px`.\n\n## Test plan\n\n- [ ] App installs as PWA (Chrome/Android \"Add to Home Screen\", Safari iOS)\n- [ ] Manifest and SW registered without console errors\n- [ ] Title and header show \"Hey Chill\"\n- [ ] Open Settings \u2192 Hands-free toggle \u2192 enable \u2192 green dot appears in header\n- [ ] Say \"hey chill\" \u2192 Quick mode starts automatically\n- [ ] Say \"hey chil\" or \"a chill\" \u2192 still triggers (fuzzy match)\n- [ ] Wake word does not trigger while Quick or Brainstorm is already recording\n- [ ] After Quick/Brainstorm ends, wake listener restarts automatically\n- [ ] Tapping Quick or Brainstorm button produces a vibration on mobile\n- [ ] On a notched phone in standalone mode, header is not obscured by the status bar\n- [ ] All existing Quick mode, Brainstorm mode, and post-processing flows still work\n\n\ud83e\udd16 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)\nEOF\n)\"\n",
  "description": "Create pull request"
}
▶ VIEW RAW DATA

  "content": {
    "type": "tool_use",
    "id": "toolu_01MN2cew2fAfuUDcXJPjHCkt",
    "name": "Bash",
    "input": {
      "command": "gh pr create --title \"feat: PWA support, wake word detection, and mobile polish\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Summary\n\n- **PWA shell**: `manifest.json` (name: \"Hey Chill\", standalone display), `sw.js` service worker for offline shell caching, and placeholder icons (192\u00d7192 PNG, 512\u00d7512 PNG, scalable SVG). New `/sw.js` and `/manifest.json` routes in `realtime_server.py` so the SW scope covers the full origin.\n- **Rename**: title and `<h1>` changed from \"Brainwave\" \u2192 \"Hey Chill\".\n- **Wake word detection**: dedicated always-on `SpeechRecognition` instance listens for \"Hey Chill\" (fuzzy regex: `hey|hay|a` + `chil{1,2}`). Automatically starts Quick mode on match. Never runs concurrently with Quick or Brainstorm recording. Paused during active sessions and restarted when they end. Green pulsing dot indicator in header shows when listening.\n- **Hands-free toggle**: new toggle in Settings modal; persisted to `localStorage`.\n- **Haptic feedback**: `navigator.vibrate(50)` on Quick and Brainstorm mic button taps.\n- **Safe area**: header now accounts for `env(safe-area-inset-top/left/right)`; mic section bottom already covered.\n- **Touch targets**: `icon-btn` enlarged to 44\u00d744 px, `replay-btn` to 44\u00d744 px, `btn-ghost`/`btn-send`/`btn-process` get `min-height: 44px`.\n\n## Test plan\n\n- [ ] App installs as PWA (Chrome/Android \"Add to Home Screen\", Safari iOS)\n- [ ] Manifest and SW registered without console errors\n- [ ] Title and header show \"Hey Chill\"\n- [ ] Open Settings \u2192 Hands-free toggle \u2192 enable \u2192 green dot appears in header\n- [ ] Say \"hey chill\" \u2192 Quick mode starts automatically\n- [ ] Say \"hey chil\" or \"a chill\" \u2192 still triggers (fuzzy match)\n- [ ] Wake word does not trigger while Quick or Brainstorm is already recording\n- [ ] After Quick/Brainstorm ends, wake listener restarts automatically\n- [ ] Tapping Quick or Brainstorm button produces a vibration on mobile\n- [ ] On a notched phone in standalone mode, header is not obscured by the status bar\n- [ ] All existing Quick mode, Brainstorm mode, and post-processing flows still work\n\n\ud83e\udd16 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)\nEOF\n)\"\n",
      "description": "Create pull request"
    },
    "caller": {
      "type": "direct"
    }
  }
}

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #103
## Status DONE ## What Changed - `static/icons/icon.svg` — SVG mic icon for PWA (new) - `static/icons/icon-192.png` — 192×192 PNG placeholder icon (new) - `static/icons/icon-512.png` — 512×512 PNG placeholder icon (new) - `static/manifest.json` — PWA manifest: name "Hey Chill", standalone display, icons (new) - `static/sw.js` — Service worker: offline shell caching (network-first HTML, cache-first assets) (new) - `static/realtime.html` — Title/H1 "Hey Chill", manifest link, apple-touch-icon, SW registration script, wake-dot element, hands-free toggle in settings modal - `static/main.js` — Wake word detection (separate `wakeRecognition` instance, fuzzy `hey|hay|a + chil{1,2}` match), `setHandsFree()`, `startWakeWordListening()`, haptic feedback on mic buttons, hands-free state persisted to localStorage, wake dot toggled on state changes - `static/style.css` — `.wake-dot` pulse animation, `.toggle-label`/`.toggle-switch`/`.toggle-track` for the settings toggle, safe-area insets added to `.header`, `icon-btn` and `replay-btn` enlarged to 44×44px, `btn-ghost`/`btn-send`/`btn-process` get `min-height: 44px` - `realtime_server.py` — Added `/sw.js` (no-cache) and `/manifest.json` routes so SW scope covers origin root ## Key Decisions - Serving `sw.js` from `/sw.js` (not `/static/sw.js`) avoids needing a `Service-Worker-Allowed` header to expand scope beyond `/static/` - Used a **separate** `wakeRecognition` instance (never concurrent with Quick/Brainstorm) rather than multiplexing the single instance — simpler state machine, avoids browser conflicts - Fuzzy wake word regex `/\b(hey|hay|a)\s+chil{1,2}\b/` covers the requested variants without false-positives on short words ## PR / Branch - Branch: `pwa-wake-word-mobile` - PR: https://github.com/chillkimtest-oss/hey-chill-v2/pull/3
▶ VIEW RAW DATA 
{
  "content": {
    "type": "text",
    "text": "## Status\nDONE\n\n## What Changed\n- `static/icons/icon.svg` \u2014 SVG mic icon for PWA (new)\n- `static/icons/icon-192.png` \u2014 192\u00d7192 PNG placeholder icon (new)\n- `static/icons/icon-512.png` \u2014 512\u00d7512 PNG placeholder icon (new)\n- `static/manifest.json` \u2014 PWA manifest: name \"Hey Chill\", standalone display, icons (new)\n- `static/sw.js` \u2014 Service worker: offline shell caching (network-first HTML, cache-first assets) (new)\n- `static/realtime.html` \u2014 Title/H1 \"Hey Chill\", manifest link, apple-touch-icon, SW registration script, wake-dot element, hands-free toggle in settings modal\n- `static/main.js` \u2014 Wake word detection (separate `wakeRecognition` instance, fuzzy `hey|hay|a + chil{1,2}` match), `setHandsFree()`, `startWakeWordListening()`, haptic feedback on mic buttons, hands-free state persisted to localStorage, wake dot toggled on state changes\n- `static/style.css` \u2014 `.wake-dot` pulse animation, `.toggle-label`/`.toggle-switch`/`.toggle-track` for the settings toggle, safe-area insets added to `.header`, `icon-btn` and `replay-btn` enlarged to 44\u00d744px, `btn-ghost`/`btn-send`/`btn-process` get `min-height: 44px`\n- `realtime_server.py` \u2014 Added `/sw.js` (no-cache) and `/manifest.json` routes so SW scope covers origin root\n\n## Key Decisions\n- Serving `sw.js` from `/sw.js` (not `/static/sw.js`) avoids needing a `Service-Worker-Allowed` header to expand scope beyond `/static/`\n- Used a **separate** `wakeRecognition` instance (never concurrent with Quick/Brainstorm) rather than multiplexing the single instance \u2014 simpler state machine, avoids browser conflicts\n- Fuzzy wake word regex `/\\b(hey|hay|a)\\s+chil{1,2}\\b/` covers the requested variants without false-positives on short words\n\n## PR / Branch\n- Branch: `pwa-wake-word-mobile`\n- PR: https://github.com/chillkimtest-oss/hey-chill-v2/pull/3"
  }
}
